This is urgent, team: **A few moments ago, Donald Trump left the stage at a _huge_ rally in my home state of Michigan.**

Trump is taking direct aim at my state because he's desperate for a Republican midterm victory, and as the chair of the DSCC, **it’s my job to make sure that doesn’t happen.**

[**I'm counting on this grassroots team to respond TONIGHT. Please chip in $5 to help defend the Senate and stop Trump:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/7283?amount=5&t=18&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20220402-GaryPetersDSCCChair-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20220402-GaryPetersDSCCChair-TrumpRally-Pros-sl1&akid=3653%2E9716520%2EnzMDHJ)

Last week he was in Georgia, attacking Raphael Warnock and calling for his defeat. Before that, he was in Florida, pumping up Marco Rubio in his fight against Val Demings. Each time he holds one of these rallies, it's a HUGE fundraising boon for GOP candidates everywhere.

We set a rapid response goal of raising $25,000 TONIGHT to keep up with Trump and his GOP allies, before our vulnerable candidates are overwhelmed. **I've seen what this grassroots team is capable of, and I’m counting on you to step up again.**

**[Please -- Trump and the Republicans are going all-out to take back the Senate, and the DSCC finance team tells me we’re FAR short of our must-hit rapid-response goal. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC
body:
Peter, on April 5th you have the chance to take control of your children’s education.
Peter,_Our education system needs to be reformed.**We must show up to vote on April 5th and elect conservatives to our school boards.**_**Parents SHOULD have a say in their children 's education.** Instead of demonizing parents for inquiring what is being taught in their classrooms, we need to encourage curriculum transparency and make it clear what is being taught.We can stop CRT, make sure students are in the classroom, and increase curriculum transparency but we must show up to the polls next month.**[Donate now to help us encourage conservatives to get out to vote and remove liberal school board members. We must take charge when it comes to education.](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiiiyd-idtjvlhlh-r/)** Thanks,Bryan

**Bryan Steil**
Congressman [Help Us Fight Back](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiiiyd-idtjvlhlh-y/) [](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiiiyd-idtjvlhlh-j/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiiiyd-idtjvlhlh-t/)[](https://email.rally.digital/t/j-l-zhiiiyd-idtjvlhlh-i/) [ Forward ](https://steilforwisconsininc.forwardtomyfriend.com/j-idtjvlhlh-C89B6A88-zhiiiyd-l-h) | PAID FOR BY STEIL FOR WISCONSIN, INC

name: Genesis 123 Foundation
subject: Humanitarian Crisis
body:
Dear Peter: Not since World War II have we seen the type of atrocities and destruction in Ukraine that Putin has caused. We have not seen a purging and extermination of this magnitude since Stalin. The impact of this war is bringing the kind of turmoil that other nations throughout Europe haven't experienced in nearly 80 years. Cities reduced to rubble...refugees fleeing by the thousands with nothing but the clothes on their backs...and stories of death and tragedy abound. As Putin destroys an entire nation and dehumanizes its people, we must never allow the world to forget what happens when a madman takes action and displaces an entire nation. **[At the Genesis 123 Foundation, we're asking for your URGENT help so that we can get supplies DIRECTLY to those who are helping these refugees with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021799:6s8fGmoNH:m:1:3317145305:A4D3E3AA84BD47EA2FACCCF2B0FB3078:r "At the Genesis 123 Foundation, we’re asking for your URGENT
help so that we can get supplies DIRECTLY to those who are helping these refugees with your donation of $25, $50, or $100 today.")** Consider Boris Romantschenko, a SURVIVOR of four World War II Nazi concentration camps. This man survived multiple, unspeakable horrors, only to be killed in the Russian bombing of his home in the north-eastern city of Kharkiv. He dedicated his life to actively campaigning for the memory of the crimes of Nazism, and in the blink of an eye, his life was lost due to the vicious acts of one ruthless dictator. Boris is but one of thousands of innocent civilians killed in this war. We continue to pray for his family and others, and hope that political leaders will find an end to this war. Europe will again rebuild one day, but until that time, the millions of people impacted by the horror of this war can't wait. **[We MUST DO MORE.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021799:6s8fGmoNH:m:1:3317145305:A4D3E3AA84BD47EA2FACCCF2B0FB3078:r "We MUST DO MORE.")** **[We need your IMMEDIATE help to feed and clothe the women, children, and elderly who did nothing wrong but live in a country under attack. Many are still without their much-needed medication or diapers for their newborn babies.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021799:6s8fGmoNH:m:1:3317145305:A4D3E3AA84BD47EA2FACCCF2B0FB3078:r "We need your IMMEDIATE help to feed and clothe
the women, children, and elderly who did nothing wrong but live in a country under attack. Many are still without their much-needed medication or
diapers for their newborn babies.")** Picture the plight of these innocent civilians. **The temperature is dropping below freezing** as millions of Ukrainian citizens escape the bombing of their homes with nothing but the clothes on their backs. The horrors we are witnessing due to Russia's invasion of Ukraine are too numerous to list. **Putin 's war in Ukraine has created a humanitarian crisis against a people who have faced years of oppression and extinction under both Nazi and Communist regimes. I saw this firsthand when I was there helping Soviet Jews emigrate to Israel back in the 1980s.** Unlike those times, we can take immediate action before the politicians and diplomats end this war. **[Can I count on your support of $500, $250, $100 $50, $25, or any amount you can afford to help us feed, clothe, and shelter Ukrainian refugees, whose numbers grow every day?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021799:6s8fGmoNH:m:1:3317145305:A4D3E3AA84BD47EA2FACCCF2B0FB3078:r "Can I count on your support of $500, $250, $100 $50, $25, or
any amount you can afford to help us feed, clothe, and shelter Ukrainian refugees, whose numbers grow every day?")** Neighboring countries throughout Europe are feeling the ramifications of this war, especially on the humanitarian front and they alone cannot handle the strain on their communities. **Nearly 4,000,000 refugees are in Poland, and this number is growing daily.** When humanity is at its darkest, we often see rays of light that shine through and remind us of the spirit of love and compassion. **[In these darkest of times, I hope I can count on your contribution to bring light to those who are in desperate need.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021799:6s8fGmoNH:m:1:3317145305:A4D3E3AA84BD47EA2FACCCF2B0FB3078:r "In these darkest of times, I hope I can count on your contribution to bring light to those who are in desperate need.")** May the Lord Bless You and Keep You, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I decided to run for the U.S. Senate in 2010 because growing entitlements and out-of-control federal spending had exploded our national debt to $14 trillion. We were on an unsustainable path that was mortgaging our children's future.

Fortunately, Americans decided that a government controlled by liberal Democrats wasn't good for the country, and they elected Republicans to the House to halt President Obama's extreme policies. A Republican majority in the Senate followed in 2014.

As I ran for re-election in 2016, we had the prospect of electing a Republican president who could work with a Republican Congress not only to stop the expansion of liberal policies but, we hoped, to reverse some of the damage done during Mr. Obama's administration. I figured we had an opportunity to put America back on the right path, and I was more than willing to dedicate myself to that worthy effort.

By and large, Republican policies worked. Regulatory relief and a more competitive tax system helped create a healthy economy with low inflation and record low unemployment. Strengthening the military deterred our enemies, and policies designed to secure the borders dramatically reduced the flow of illegal immigration.

During the 2016 campaign, I said it would be my last campaign and final term. That was my strong preference, and my wife's--we both looked forward to a normal private life. However, neither of us anticipated the Democrats' complete takeover of government and the disastrous policies they have already inflicted on America and the world, to say nothing of those they threaten to enact in the future.

Nor did we anticipate the pandemic, the government's failed response to it, the loss of freedom that has resulted, and the tyrannical approach taken by the elites who have created and maintained a state of fear that allows them to exercise control over Americans' lives. Instead of everyone working to achieve the goal President Biden stated during his inaugural address--unifying and healing America--it feels as if our nation is being torn apart.

As I travel around Wisconsin and talk to citizens who love our country, I know I am not the only one with grave concerns. My message has always been that America is precious, and it is our solemn duty to make sure it survives and thrives for future generations.

President Reagan warned that freedom is fragile, always one generation away from extinction. As I have told crowds since my first Tea Party speeches in 2010: This is a fight for freedom. This is not someone else's fight, this is our fight, and it's a fight we absolutely must win.

I believe America is in peril. Much as I'd like to ease into a quiet retirement, I don't feel I should. Countless people have encouraged me to run, saying they rely on me to be their voice, to speak plain and obvious truths other elected leaders shirk from expressing--truths the elite in government, mainstream media, and Big Tech don't want you to hear.

In 2010 I promised I would always tell people the truth and that I would never vote with re-election in mind. When re-election isn't your primary motivation, those are easy promises to keep. Today, I am announcing I will continue to fight for freedom in the public realm by running for re-election. It is a decision I haven't made lightly. Having already experienced a growing level of vitriol and false attacks, I certainly don't expect better treatment in the future. For my campaign to succeed, I will need the support of every American who values the truth and refuses to allow lies and distortions to prevail.

Tens of millions of dollars will be spent trying to destroy and defeat me. The mainstream media and Big Tech will contribute their powerful and corrupt voices as the unofficial but reliable communication apparatus of the Democrats. We face powerful forces that desire even more power and control over our lives. Their path, paved with false hope and greater dependency, always leads to tyranny. We cannot let them win.

So I will humbly ask, Peter, for your endorsement to help me SAVE AMERICA.
---
| | | [ENDORSE RON JOHNSON](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021813:6FEUwmojN:m:1:3317145305:201DE944635C20E0E5FD0A579CA85D22:r "ENDORSE RON JOHNSON")
---
Thank you,
Ron Johnson
---
| |
* * *
---

---
| Peter, It's Ron Johnson.

I have just announced my campaign for re-election to the U.S. Senate.

I never could have imagined our country would be where it is today. From out of control spending to reckless liberal mandates, America is on the precipice of disaster.

This will not be an easy win but I am ready to fight to **SAVE AMERICA** from the Democrats.

**[Can I count on you to join me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021814:6FEUwmojN:m:1:3317145305:201DE944635C20E0E5FD0A579CA85D22:r "Please click here to donate now")**

name: Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
subject: Your digital guide to the Constitution
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zif29qhbggkgq0a9db2d57g1vqho4t723lur4nn8_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbob2s9me4o74spksoqn3c3265prbchm69h73cj3csrjcc3h66pj3db5e3gb7cdgsv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6pti61j75dpl61jrcob66jgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933c5ge9o70c1i64oh5u)
| | | [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi4e98m53eopa9q7tm3ktoo2nnhsqv4jejcm9jjg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs)
---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvlpvuft8ao4oklcc9imkuj4btppdtntrotbdo7o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj5gfv6vpv93p0a18vqn0djphlecv1umip4fe1p8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk2c4tt9mntmmd27hd9es4sm0r3bructa474pu4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zc0hsrq53meili5s4mgm6164ofc18vcti6lud51g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdsh5u0mip5ralgq4cspnugptcp8d936nc5jtc9o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation
---
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsad6brm0icre6ffk9trvqsful0dr0lhmr0e26ao_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o34c9h2bs)
---
The Heritage Foundation | 214 Massachusetts Avenue, NE | Washington, D.C. 20002

body:
You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you hav

| | | This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zhvpe62g5rt71vfmte0ner7lj391d43ojm8e15ug_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven’t read the book, you know the name. It’s _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we’re working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America’s greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, “****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** ”](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhu8p3a71uqfhanpoes9p0q5sfgcgu79du8qhqg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs) Twain’s realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I’d like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zv7dvhjeheca4lnuerh9u8c293if9g43cl8bjqe0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs).
---
| [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z81sk34va1ec2bnloe165ugv4edmlgsetd15b1uo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zklqd9570udatuqlnk6ivml61b2pfq6p62o0bmpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ’01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, “All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ ” Don’t let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **“Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories”** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgrbar8kq27pt3tfp21m5rqimjvc34lqca3t3g3o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o33c9h2bs)

name: American Update
subject: Where should I send this?
body:
Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9722%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=SKGdPgk3yQj6X%2bjmn4Otmg&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27280%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PUfdKtkYWX0DDj1Mvo%2bnyQ&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27281%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rK7ZVfmbFIjKJGwrZzVLdg&sysid=1)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tP%2fvWKfPMEd1SPuw%2bGt9Fg&sysid=1),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27283%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bQXW3O9ogk5V1R1sz19l3Q&sysid=1) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27282%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tP%2fvWKfPMEd1SPuw%2bGt9Fg&sysid=1)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27284%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tZmPagxp7SIH6t186R7FHA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

clean_body: Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, “” has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching “,” we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of “” on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Hello Friend,

I need YOUR help to SAVE AMERICA! Anti-establishment conservatives must stand up and join the fight to restore the values that make our republic great.

Let me introduce you to my friend and fellow patriot, Regina Mauro. Regina is a mother, businesswoman, educator, and lifelong conservative activist running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 6th district. But most importantly, Regina is an America-First fighter!

**She has the outspoken grit and spine needed to reclaim her seat from the Democrats, take back Congress, and fire Nancy Pelosi!**

[**_Will you support Regina 's America First campaign with a donation of $10, $20.22, $50, or any generous amount? Click here to donate today >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4qfjrsng64f0cjbu8k3sk1s013d447q9a3i0fpg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)

Regina Mauro will fight for the values you and I share, friend.

Values like:
* **Pro-Life** \- Regina believes that protecting human life should not be up for debate. She will work to foster better adoption programs, defund Planned Parenthood, promote life as the only humane option, and empower women to choose life!

* **Secure Borders** \- As the child of legal immigrants, Regina believes people must come here legally or not at all. She will stand up to strengthen our border security, support our border patrol agents, and finish building the wall on our southern border.

* **Election Integrity** \- The Democrats are trying to dismantle our elections systems in their favor. Regina will work to put election protections in place like voter ID laws and strengthen penalties on those who obstruct election integrity.

* **School Choice** \- Regina wants children to have access to the best education possible. Parents should be allowed to decide which schools their children attend. It is your money, your kids, and your choice.

Regina has my _complete trust_ that she will make America First policies her top priorities in Washington, DC.

**Will you join me in supporting an outspoken patriot? Click any link below to donate.**

[**_Donate $10 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr6omp32ota66hph34mdctpibscvcqf3eo2k0omg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)

[**_Donate $100 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4qnrgc2pm20639detcg19ieg4hb8vc9i8f9821g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)
[**_Donate $250 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdvc17e9cb1lbjj2pqplss40ur3a4i6qmbpad238_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)
[**_Donate $500 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvc6mee5af56b4bbl2e74f560o863742nb7g31eg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)
[**_Donate $1,000 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zna1uf4u7t93g7aop7b4ujskah60507q9kfukiu0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)
[**_Donate $2,900 >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za9002gnceqonej5gnpd856t99io3m203jbelv00_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)
[**_Donate Any Amount >>>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv6ldckhp8v6joml9ue04oscjee1c25ao7d3fsl8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjge0o31cph2bs)

Regina refuses to back down and will never compromise when it comes to Faith, Family, and Freedom.

**She is approaching this election with a mother 's care and a warrior spirit! **

But she's not just fighting for you and me, friend. She's fighting for our children, our country, and our God-given rights.

Please click below and help Regina reclaim her seat from the Democrats. Then we can take back Congress, fire Nancy Pelosi, and save America!

Thank you and God Bless,

Dr. Kelli Ward,
Chairwoman of the Republican Party of Arizona

I’m losing to this crazy, leftist opponent of mine, and I need your help.

**_Without your support, there are a few things that are going to happen:_**
* Chuck Schumer’s handpicked dream candidate is going to represent Louisiana in the U.S. Senate

* Nationwide draconian legislation will be passed because there will be nobody in Washington Left to stand up to the Left and tell it how it is

_“John James is a fantastic candidate running for Congress in Michigan’s 10th Congressional District. John was a brave combat pilot, flying the very impressive Apache Helicopter in Operation Iraqi Freedom. John isn’t just tough, but he is also very smart --he received his Master’s Degree in Supply Chain Management from Penn State and his MBA from the University of Michigan. He is a job creator and a problem solver who knows how to deliver for Michigan. What’s more important during a supply chain crisis than a supply chain expert? John James is going to be a great Republican member of Congress, and has my Complete and Total Endorsement!” _ **\- President Donald J. Trump**

name: Rob Ortt
subject: Weekly Newsletter from Leader Rob Ortt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR SENATE
body:
Sunday, April 3rd Edition
| | | |
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wkdiSwwD5R6MMKC44Og3gSgu3Gl0_ZHMcoU1N0HSirvOh8F8KSix0da06RNh6DOx9IwQdY5T8OR0Mlhmx9EsXceqZQDyLa51kbQ1mQNZljhjIH9Gk1VzajOT0GQN-GwNWx9ybH9Y9BXOpds6rS7p6Q==&c=1jLQqYV2zOAPj0Vu2U9iex4KAewocL7yegAH1ipsbFeEfrkNCdTUag==&ch=LcIbEYzWqu36MSqUEBkBZvqWOor8OOsMtYbige_iijaSkMcOnF_zFQ==)
---
|
---
# Weekly Newsletter
---
|
---
April 3, 2022 | Issue XIV
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Brockport Backs the Blue
---
---
Yesterday, New York Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Former NYPD Deputy Inspector and current candidate for New York Lieutenant Governor Alison Esposito, and members of the Brockport Community stood inside the Brockport Area Veterans' Club today to show an unwavering commitment to supporting law enforcement and protest a speaking event featuring convicted cop-killer Anthony Bottom (AKA Jalil Muntaqim).
"It's absolutely disgusting, shameful, and intellectually dishonest for SUNY Brockport to let a convicted cop-killer - pretending to be a 'political prisoner' - speak at a campus event and get paid to do it. It's tone-deaf to the Brockport community's actual overwhelming support for law enforcement. That's why we stood together to show our full support for those who protect us. Our rally's message today is clear: We Back the Blue and their families, and unequivocally reject cop-killer Anthony Bottom's speaking event today," said Leader Rob Ortt.
---
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wkdiSwwD5R6MMKC44Og3gSgu3Gl0_ZHMcoU1N0HSirvOh8F8KSix0birJkaOXhkhu46Jl2E447Fkg7gt9VuOkl6S6F8-gsmc-9oL_PuuF3a5iL2AR0x5ROVkXkTrB6Gec7oVZLv4VnYn-da1g9yV5eAhJsRHmZgtaNKQYsi67RQvdH0WPUPsjVWv87Lm9U2H4J7ax4qs4HnXFUAU4mzg0UZUlHuGeEGkQ3uZN8GHX5-roehJzmfi3QiSbfbiyOQO&c=1jLQqYV2zOAPj0Vu2U9iex4KAewocL7yegAH1ipsbFeEfrkNCdTUag==&ch=LcIbEYzWqu36MSqUEBkBZvqWOor8OOsMtYbige_iijaSkMcOnF_zFQ==)
---
| Senate, Assembly Republicans & Law Enforcement Officials Call for Criminal Justice Changes
---
On Tuesday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Assembly Republican Leader Will Barclay, law enforcement officials and members of the Assembly and Senate Republican Conferences called on Gov. Kathy Hochul and legislative leaders to reverse failed criminal justice policies and strengthen public protection in the 2022-23 State Budget.
"For the past three years, New Yorkers have seen the disastrous effects of One-Party Rule on their safety and well-being. Violent crime rates are up, security in neighborhoods is down. It's time for Albany leaders to admit what we all know - their record on public safety has been an abysmal failure, and they must decisively change course in this year's state budget. That means no more criminal coddling. Supporting law enforcement. Repealing bail reform, making Kendra's Law permanent, and fixing New York's discovery laws. Let's restore public safety to our state," said Leader Ortt.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wkdiSwwD5R6MMKC44Og3gSgu3Gl0_ZHMcoU1N0HSirvOh8F8KSix0birJkaOXhkhrW69jP8eDNv8avKE0Z73llvappYc_qK3yT-Sk1x1SF5erfITtsxXtzbBcNXbfswmangvnE6_98PJ74EiQd0It-z26Sggov6ip1XEacpSNYylExOBfUYr3Cmo-Tx6XedMc4h9o77lmOO-FEqM2iYrBT8iDkP0fIB8us_s9xHS0GrfrRncS-JLQraIab-y5c79lHTomr0rO3o=&c=1jLQqYV2zOAPj0Vu2U9iex4KAewocL7yegAH1ipsbFeEfrkNCdTUag==&ch=LcIbEYzWqu36MSqUEBkBZvqWOor8OOsMtYbige_iijaSkMcOnF_zFQ==)
---
| |
---
| |
---
Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt with legislative colleagues and law enforcement during Tuesday's press conference.
---
| |
---
| | Senators to State: Save The Settlement Funds Senators call on Governor Hochul to Fund Addiction Treatment Services with Opioid Settlement Money
---
---
Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt stands with Lawmakers and Advocates
---
On Wednesday, New York State Senators Rob Ortt, Sue Serino, Fred Akshar, Peter Oberacker and other members of the Senate Republican Conference joined advocates in calling for legislative leaders to save the opioid settlement funds and reject Governor Hochul's state budget proposal to circumvent existing New York State law and spend $265 million in opioid settlement funding without any formal plan or input from the state-appointed advisory board.
"The Opioid Settlement Board was put in place to provide accountability and ensure that opioid settlement funds are properly directed toward prevention, treatment, and recovery services. It's unacceptable that there are still vacancies on the Board with the state budget deadline just a few days away. It's imperative these seats are filled and the Board is able to carry out its important goal to ensure that funding in the budget truly goes to help those who are struggling with addiction in our communities," said Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt.

Albany Democrats ignored the will of New Yorkers who demanded fair, independent redistricting. Instead, they adopted partisan maps to protect themselves.
On Thursday, a judge ruled their gerrymandered maps as UNCONSTITUTIONAL.
This is a victory for ALL New Yorkers.
On Friday, Leader[ Rob Ortt](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wkdiSwwD5R6MMKC44Og3gSgu3Gl0_ZHMcoU1N0HSirvOh8F8KSix0birJkaOXhkhetQ81V6sjyGQto2omhin6PneLEkR--YsGj0d4IzfSy0LsO_-q0vafk2mPOlKvWgwqkrOG3r7kF9gY4eb2Fg0PVZ3AhAN94At0SuP1LNiGxai0jXQDWqJP1TKKuhqfepOs81ft4WSDIoEbj6pm2t38z9sskwNn10oMwR-H7jloushSwfGd6aasYYsv_KszRrYLrVMqijxpSNH4iSnH5lG1eUgs_KUgr7Iz89XErRLRsEjnlytBfrN_qiocUc3t5sE-y3mMoTlFQ3LgStE6bjqhEoZo5U7m18Nt4UnPHZ1k7w8ZNLbOx1Khzw5cBP072rok6hrzH3_2Uu2Nkfa5NgekX_Q-J45B7wYkdQa17E92BM=&c=1jLQqYV2zOAPj0Vu2U9iex4KAewocL7yegAH1ipsbFeEfrkNCdTUag==&ch=LcIbEYzWqu36MSqUEBkBZvqWOor8OOsMtYbige_iijaSkMcOnF_zFQ==) and Republican lawmakers sent a letter to legislative leaders calling for a collaborative approach to creating fair & bipartisan legislative district maps.

Like so many others, Mr. Nasseri has sacrificed on behalf of both nations and he understands that the fight is not over. We're working together to ensure safe passage for those still left behind.

clean_body: Sunday, April 3rd Edition | | | | == | Weekly Newsletter | April 3, 2022 | Issue XIV | | | | | Brockport Backs the Blue Yesterday, New York Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Former NYPD Deputy Inspector and current candidate for New York Lieutenant Governor Alison Esposito, and members of the Brockport Community stood inside the Brockport Area Veterans' Club today to show an unwavering commitment to supporting law enforcement and protest a speaking event featuring convicted cop-killer Anthony Bottom (AKA Jalil Muntaqim). "It's absolutely disgusting, shameful, and intellectually dishonest for SUNY Brockport to let a convicted cop-killer - pretending to be a 'political prisoner' - speak at a campus event and get paid to do it. It's tone-deaf to the Brockport community's actual overwhelming support for law enforcement. That's why we stood together to show our full support for those who protect us. Our rally's message today is clear: We Back the Blue and their families, and unequivocally reject cop-killer Anthony Bottom's speaking event today," said Leader Rob Ortt. | == | Senate, Assembly Republicans & Law Enforcement Officials Call for Criminal Justice Changes On Tuesday, New York State Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt, Assembly Republican Leader Will Barclay, law enforcement officials and members of the Assembly and Senate Republican Conferences called on Gov. Kathy Hochul and legislative leaders to reverse failed criminal justice policies and strengthen public protection in the 2022-23 State Budget. "For the past three years, New Yorkers have seen the disastrous effects of One-Party Rule on their safety and well-being. Violent crime rates are up, security in neighborhoods is down. It's time for Albany leaders to admit what we all know - their record on public safety has been an abysmal failure, and they must decisively change course in this year's state budget. That means no more criminal coddling. Supporting law enforcement. Repealing bail reform, making Kendra's Law permanent, and fixing New York's discovery laws. Let's restore public safety to our state," said Leader Ortt. | == | | | | Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt with legislative colleagues and law enforcement during Tuesday's press conference. | | | | Senators to State: Save The Settlement Funds Senators call on Governor Hochul to Fund Addiction Treatment Services with Opioid Settlement Money Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt stands with Lawmakers and Advocates On Wednesday, New York State Senators Rob Ortt, Sue Serino, Fred Akshar, Peter Oberacker and other members of the Senate Republican Conference joined advocates in calling for legislative leaders to save the opioid settlement funds and reject Governor Hochul's state budget proposal to circumvent existing New York State law and spend $265 million in opioid settlement funding without any formal plan or input from the state-appointed advisory board. "The Opioid Settlement Board was put in place to provide accountability and ensure that opioid settlement funds are properly directed toward prevention, treatment, and recovery services. It's unacceptable that there are still vacancies on the Board with the state budget deadline just a few days away. It's imperative these seats are filled and the Board is able to carry out its important goal to ensure that funding in the budget truly goes to help those who are struggling with addiction in our communities," said Senate Minority Leader Rob Ortt. | == | | | | Leader Rob Ortt and == == react to the Supreme Court Ruling against their unconstitutional gerrymander Albany Democrats ignored the will of New Yorkers who demanded fair, independent redistricting. Instead, they adopted partisan maps to protect themselves. On Thursday, a judge ruled their gerrymandered maps as UNCONSTITUTIONAL. This is a victory for ALL New Yorkers. name: Keystone Pipeline Petition (via House GOP)
subject: We saw this coming. Did you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | | | President Trump predicted this disastrous energy crisis back in 2020. He warned us all that Joe Biden would destroy the oil industry and continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil.

Now gas prices continue to keep going up under President Biden's watch! $4.. $5... even $6 now!

**We 've had enough, haven't you? **

It's time that Joe Biden brings back the Keystone Pipeline _and_ restores American energy independence.

Help us send a clear message to Biden and add your name to our petition to demand Biden bring back the Keystone Pipeline.

---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: House GOP Alert
Date: Wed., March 09, 2022 at 1:29 PM
Subject: Tell Joe Biden: Bring Back the Keystone Pipeline
To: _**[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r)**_

Joe Biden has announced a ban on Russian oil and gas in response to Putin's war on Ukraine.

_**Now, instead of turning to American energy to fill the gap, Biden wants to buy oil from Iran, Venezuela, or Saudi Arabia. **_

Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT! Now, Biden has launched an all-out war on American energy and American jobs.

On Day One of his Administration, Joe Biden **GUTTED** American energy independence by shutting down American energy production. Then he worsened our dependence on oil from hostile countries by **CANCELING** the Keystone XL Pipeline.
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
To make things worse, Biden greenlit Russian pipelines, allowing foreign energy to thrive while Americans faced higher prices at the pump.

**Joe Biden would rather buy oil and gas from foreign countries who hate us than create American jobs and restore our energy independence --_let that sink in._ **

Americans are sick and tired of Biden putting America LAST. Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline and restore American energy independence.

Biden won't listen unless the American people raise their voices and speak out against his war on American energy. Tell Joe Biden: _**[BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r "BRING BACK THE
KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!")**_
---
| | | [TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE")
---
We have a clear choice: 1) We can either let Joe Biden continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil, or 2) We can send a clear message to Joe Biden: _**[Bring back the Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021880:6iO1hmoNx:m:1:3317145305:EE8606085EB56B8ED47B7B940D37877A:r "Bring back the
Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence.")**_

Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment.

clean_body: | | | | President Trump predicted this disastrous energy crisis back in 2020. He warned us all that Joe Biden would destroy the oil industry and continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil. Now gas prices continue to keep going up under President Biden's watch! $4.. $5... even $6 now! We 've had enough, haven't you? It's time that Joe Biden brings back the Keystone Pipeline and restores American energy independence. Help us send a clear message to Biden and add your name to our petition to demand Biden bring back the Keystone Pipeline. | | | "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE" \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: House GOP Alert Date: Wed., March 09, 2022 at 1:29 PM Subject: Tell Joe Biden: Bring Back the Keystone Pipeline To: Joe Biden has announced a ban on Russian oil and gas in response to Putin's war on Ukraine. Now, instead of turning to American energy to fill the gap, Biden wants to buy oil from Iran, Venezuela, or Saudi Arabia. Under President Trump, America was ENERGY INDEPENDENT! Now, Biden has launched an all-out war on American energy and American jobs. On Day One of his Administration, Joe Biden GUTTED American energy independence by shutting down American energy production. Then he worsened our dependence on oil from hostile countries by CANCELING the Keystone XL Pipeline. | | | "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE" To make things worse, Biden greenlit Russian pipelines, allowing foreign energy to thrive while Americans faced higher prices at the pump. Joe Biden would rather buy oil and gas from foreign countries who hate us than create American jobs and restore our energy independence --let that sink in. Americans are sick and tired of Biden putting America LAST. Biden MUST bring back the Keystone XL Pipeline and restore American energy independence. Biden won't listen unless the American people raise their voices and speak out against his war on American energy. Tell Joe Biden: "BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE and RESTORE AMERICAN ENERGY INDEPENDENCE!" | | | "TELL BIDEN TO BRING BACK THE KEYSTONE PIPELINE" We have a clear choice: 1) We can either let Joe Biden continue to gut American energy and leave our country at the mercy of foreign oil, or 2) We can send a clear message to Joe Biden: "Bring back the Keystone Pipeline and restore American energy independence." Hello,
When Donald Trump was elected, I submitted my request to retire from the U.S. Navy after nearly 4 decades of military service. I never expected I’d one day run for office, but I felt called to continue to serve in whatever way was most meaningful.
People told me to prepare myself – to prepare my family – for what lay ahead. They warned me of the nasty attacks, that politics is a ‘blood sport.’ **I never thought a Super PAC would run over a million dollars in TV ads attacking me for serving in the U.S. Navy, but that’s exactly what happened.**
They tried to say that because my military service took me and my family from state-to-state, from country-to-country, that I somehow wasn’t an Iowan anymore. They pretended my upbringing in rural, northwest Iowa never happened. They ignored the sacrifices that my wife, my kids, and my family made in my service.
**And worst of all, they attacked and denigrated every servicemember and every military family that has to pack up, change schools, say goodbye to friends, and sometimes spend holidays thousands of miles away from each other.**
This time, I’m taking on an even greater challenge. And in my campaign to defeat Republican Senator Chuck Grassley, things are going to get even nastier. I am sure of it, because control of the Senate hinges on our race and whether or not we can turn Iowa blue.
**In order to be ready to fight back, we need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling pretty short. I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so if we’re going to have the resources we need to win, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give right now:**
[**I wouldn’t ask if it weren’t important: Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now to my campaign – every dollar you can afford before our critical midnight deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43720386/338417288/-42398318?refcode=em20220403am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYWY3ZDFmNC00ZGIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NioGMGZSlv8XW-d6BwMud6aPRVz5EgwQCDAdN5TIpuU=)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z2fn32urkcss2lb6ge1ti1lge02dc37ofvqt5al0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbrjephgcuq77c3jmlojcpthm6pr8djkc6on2slme1p3bclkcopr2o31curj4thgcv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj66ljjad70etg6cdj4mmomfc5lclp238h1e8he4933c5ge9p70c3im4oh5u)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhrdq18qgav4rjdj15mlb7fq204ut5h76qbr2i20_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie0o75c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5uekckn8p0dkpnodpn6ddm2dt7nnsvcg0l886ng_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie0o75c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6o83flfsmf288heqq575qlt4qlil691pm87tpro_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie0o75c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: The Heritage Foundation
subject: Your digital guide to the Constitution
body:
As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c9739%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=CvjVN%2fMER7UajN7iO7XByw&sysid=1)
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z8VxDoVM%2fjHFkl%2bvW%2b0KDQ&sysid=1)
---
Hello, As a conservative, you know and feel the pressure being put on you to abandon your principles by the progressives on the radical Left. You know that fighting back for what you believe in is the best thing to do. In these trying times, we conservatives must turn to the greatest document in the history of the world that promises freedom and opportunity to its citizens for guidance, **our Constitution.** That’s why I’m writing personally to you today. I’d like to offer you the chance to gain [**free access to Heritage’s Guide to the Constitution today to help you defend your principles against those on the far left.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27298%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2fbQXhoYuZMSeajJ7lC5GsA&sysid=1)
---
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27297%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=z8VxDoVM%2fjHFkl%2bvW%2b0KDQ&sysid=1)
---
In this free digital interactive guide, you'll find:
* **Useful, clause-by-clause analysis** of the entire Constitution and each amendment
* Input from more than **100 constitutional scholars and legal experts** including President Reagan's former Attorney General Ed Meese
* **A thorough review** of what the Constitution actually says and how it applies today
* **A copy of the Constitution** and the documents that served as its foundation

This is a critical year in our nation’s history. The country is polarized and divided on a great number of issues, and roughly half of the voting population is being swayed towards greater government control over our lives through the trojan horse of “COVID safety. They want government control of anything they can get their hands on. It is for this reason we need to educate as many people as possible, of all age groups, on the freedoms safeguarded to us in the Constitution. Because if we don’t truly understand the freedoms that it protects for us as citizens, then we will not fight to defend those freedoms. To get your free access today and to help us make sure that everyone in the conservative movement has refreshed their understanding of the Constitution this year, will you activate your free access by [**clicking this link today**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27299%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I9nHXp2ifEbGUaO1Y%2f8EzA&sysid=1)? If so, please use this link to activate your access to the guide today: [**https://secured.heritage.org/constitution/**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27290%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UaZla9%2bIyDl1jfXMGHvobQ&sysid=1) This resource has been hailed across the nation as an "outstanding Guide," which is why I consider it one of the finest resources Heritage has ever produced. I think you'll enjoy reading it, and I know you'll find use for it each day. With this powerful Guide in hand, you'll be ready to stand up to the radical Left and confidently defend the vision of our Founding Fathers. [**I hope you'll claim your copy today.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c27291%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gsp6vp5VjGDZYiYZk1JujA&sysid=1) Thank you, Dr. Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D. President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Have you seen this?
body:
I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z83lb19egre2beld0touadc3so0p3t6fo6e3emq0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2ugq69phhc5pb9p71mapr4o75euq34dticmqn6t9lc4ojap5lc1p62cj16ho78c77q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchgcppb9d9gsupb0phge2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1c3ie9p32c1j649fg)
|
---
| | From the Desk of Dr. Ben Carson: Hello, I don’t believe the majority of the public really knows what is being taught to our children and grandchildren. They assume they are taught the same lessons we learned growing up—that America is a land of freedom and opportunity where anyone has a chance at success. From what I’ve seen, this isn’t always the case. [**However, I want to know what you’ve seen.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfantmauo9k4or1278pkj3quvpm77adot5nhbmu8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie8oj0cph2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3lhlqr2uec6ajb6gth47isfs2ue62oh5653cg4o_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie8oj0cph2bs)
_Dr. Ben Carson, Founder and Chairman of American Cornerstone Institute_ I believe that **children as young as elementary age are being taught to reject our American values.** They are told that our Founding Fathers were massively flawed and that it overshadows the nation they built. They hear that our Constitution is “out of date” and needs to be “modernized.” Progressives are rewriting our nation’s history and they are doing it with our youngest and most vulnerable. We cannot let this happen! At the start of 2022, I’m going to be meeting with political leaders and educational “experts” across the country. **I’m going to make sure people know what is really happening in our schools.** I want to be able to share with them the thoughts of people who are closest to the issue. [**Specifically, I would like to include your thoughts.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztkfgddgk9u728fpsbh4edk9447ac7evhog4oua8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie8oj0cph2bs) The American Cornerstone Institute, a nonprofit I recently founded, has created a unique survey. We’re trying to gauge the state of America’s Educational System by surveying people like you. I’d like to ask you to give me 2 minutes of your time so we can better understand the problems that exist in our educational system. You can access the survey here...

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/education_survey/](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgvuk8sdhcs3f11qu2fo6fgpd2ndcf6fspks5gb0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie8oj0cph2bs) Thank you for your consideration. Regards,
Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

name: Newt, Me (2)
subject: MISSED MSG FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com FWD: I've got something for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|

| | | **MISSED MESSAGE! >>> MISSED MESSAGE! >>> MISSED MESSAGE FOR! >>>**
---

Peter,

It's Sophia from House Republicans.

I hate to bother, but Newt Gingrich reached out to you with an IMPORTANT message: **1000% MATCH LIVE until our End of Quarter Deadline because we 're TRAILING behind the Dems!**

Did you act? Sadly, no. You completely wrote him off, but all is not lost. I've authorized an EXTENSION just for you, **[but this is REALLY your last chance to help! Good news? Because we're SO behind, we've upgraded your matching to 1100%. DON'T LET US DOWN!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "but this is
REALLY your last chance to help! Good news? Because we’re SO behind, we’ve upgraded your matching to 1100%. DON’T LET US DOWN!
")**
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE PASSED. WE FAILED!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1100% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "USE YOUR 1100% MATCH NOW")
---
**[Will you act this time, or leave us hanging?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "Will you act this time, or leave us hanging?")**

Sincerely,

Sophia
House Republicans

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Newt Gingrich
Subject: I've got something for you.
To: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r)**

Hi, Peter,

House Republican leaders just finished their quarterly meeting, and let me tell you, things are far worse than you or I could ever imagine.

The Democrats are so afraid of our red wave that Nancy Pelosi and her big money allies are coughing up hundreds of millions of dollars to try to save their Big Government Socialist majority. They raised almost $20 million in February and now have close to $200 million in their warchest.

But I never back down from a fight and I know you don't either!
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---
_**[So I am reaching out to top patriots like you and pleading with you to help us catch up to Pelosi's money machine. And to make your gift go even further we have secured a very special 1000% match from a top GOP donor.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "So I am
reaching out to top patriots like yourself and pleading with you to help us catch up to Pelosi’s money machine. And to make your gift go
even further we have secured a very special 1000% match from a top GOP donor. ")**_

_Let me explain why your help is so important..._ Big Tech is against us. The Liberal Media is against us. The Big Government Socialists have an army of dark money donors backing them. **We 're going up against the kitchen sink. We need all hands on deck. **
**CRITICAL END OF QUARTER DEADLINE!**
---
| | | [USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "USE YOUR 1000% MATCH NOW")
---
Let me be clear: we need every Patriot to chip in anything they can to ensure that we have the required resources to **FLIP THE HOUSE RED. **

_**[Can I count on you to be one of the America First Patriots we need to catch up to Pelosi? Don't squander this incredibly rare 1000% matching opportunity.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021947:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "Can I count on you to be one of the America First Patriots we need to catch up to Pelosi?
Don’t squander this incredibly rare 1000% matching opportunity. ")**_

And remember you only have until MIDNIGHT to stop Big Government Socialism and destroy the Radical Left!

We can do this!

Newt Gingrich
---
| |
* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021948:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "Red Wave Image Link")

Pelosi's raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER.

**[Can we count on you to step up?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021948:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "Can we count
on you to step up?")**
---
| | | [DONATE](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021948:JciwcmoNK:m:1:3317145305:AEBB9721150128252F536390FFE02A47:r "Donate Button in Footer")
---

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.

---

name: Ann Coulter
subject: How to stop the intolerant left
body:
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the Un
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zs9lurpemp3jn64l834mfvodg4904024tlqcj1gg_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdjmtgrecb36eqmbcdje9om8ohmehqb2sj5moqeap5gmtij7cpjcphm2dple6rjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3appl6jg7ep366lhb6p37m2qmash5u)
College campuses have gone absolutely insane. Here's one thing you can do about it that can really make a difference.
|
---
| | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5seregq7330risiibcf5ctc7akjmh8bs58llnig_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) Fellow Conservative, **College campuses have gone absolutely insane.** A student group asked me to speak about our nation’s immigration laws at the University of California at Berkeley, the so-called “birthplace of the free speech movement.” As you may have heard, my speech was abruptly canceled because leftist thugs decided to riot and the administration wouldn’t stick up for free speech. Unfortunately, I’m not the only one to suffer threats and intimidation on campus. Far from it. [ **Fight the intolerant left on campus** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zripe9p6uem7oodivetgr811jm87pqcuj3mom968_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) As I point out in _Resistance is Futile: How the Trump-Hating Left Lost Its Collective Mind_ , ever since Donald Trump’s arrival in politics, **liberals have lost their minds.** But there’s no padded room to keep them contained! Instead, **these violent, masked lunatics have taken over college campuses, where young Americans are turned into automaton leftists just like themselves.** Young conservatives on college campuses across our nation are losing their right to free speech – and even the right to walk down the street without getting sucker punched – because of how intolerant the liberals have become. [**But lest you think I’ve given up hope, faithful conservative, there’s a group I trust that fights back against this onslaught and exposes leftist bias, abuse, and indoctrination on college campuses for all the world to see:_Campus Reform_.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zcovbr0epe97oqsfpvg3cdbkd4o3l8v74hgd2oq0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) **Campus Reform, a project of the Leadership Institute, is the single most powerful force for campus free speech in America today.** By sticking up for conservative students and giving them the tools necessary to defend themselves and their principles, Campus Reform provides an absolutely essential public service. **Bottom line – Campus Reform uncovers the liberal schemes that the mainstream media wants to keep hidden... and they shut down the liberals’ indoctrination on campus after campus.** [**To continue their vital work, Campus Reform counts on the generous support of conservatives just like you – yes, you! – which is why I urge you to partner with them today by making a generous gift of $25, $35, $50, $100, or more right now.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zo2vusdpk803nsnbdu9i1pemql6s59mm661m77f8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) And to sweeten the pot – when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book, _Resistance is Futile_. Saving young conservatives AND getting a free book? What a deal! [ **Get my book here** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8efogn99di702licp45kke1f8s7j8h2fg4i8ej0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) Campus police at the College of DuPage in Illinois told conservative students they’d **“lock them up” for handing out copies of the U.S. Constitution.** Yes, that dangerous document that the created the greatest country ever known to man. A teaching assistant at the University of Nebraska-Lincoln harassed the student president of a conservative group for recruiting students. With a gesture from her middle finger, she shrieked profanities at the conservative student and called her a “neo-fascist” and “Nazi.” Charming. At Purdue University in Indiana, a staffer called conservatives “vile, racist idiots” and **threatened to rape pro-life students.** (And you wonder why liberals prefer violence to debate.) In all three cases, LI’s Campus Reform exposed the truth. Armed with investigative reports from their student correspondents on campus, Campus Reform got word out to their nationwide audience of concerned conservatives. And they brought it to news outlets like Fox News, Newsmax, the Blaze, and numerous talk radio shows. Ultimately, Campus Reform’s exposure of the truth got _results_. In these cases and many others, **Campus Reform’s quick and powerful action forced universities to change their anti-conservative policies, discipline leftist student groups, and suspend or fire radical professors.** I believe an angel gets its wings every time a leftist professor is fired for their outrageous and unapologetic abuses against conservatives. But Campus Reform’s fight to make the left see the light and feel the heat won’t be won overnight. **To fight the forces of the intolerant left, stand up for free speech, and protect conservative students who want to simply share their beliefs without getting a black eye, Campus Reform is counting on your help.** [**Please make a generous investment of $25, $35, $50, or more today to support the Leadership Institute’s Campus Reform, stand up to liberal indoctrination, and ensure conservative students don’t lose their freedoms on college campuses.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8ce79a2chjjc36oc9mi4fmr9r4g5rjb1ipt4cs8_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) Friend, let’s make ‘em pay. [**Please help Campus Reform right away so they can empower conservative students and strike back at the lunatic liberals.**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zj5lk9f68e854qlh38rv2sf6rnjqj8pbegfsvrto_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) Thank you. In liberty, Ann Coulter **P.S. Remember, when you give $100 or more to LI’s Campus Reform, I’ll rush you a copy of my book,_Resistance is Futile_.** It’s just one more way I can thank you for joining this crucial cause. Because **if we lose the kids, we lose this country.** [**Please donate right away.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z645tq0rnv8u138blghb797uognbvio8125eb42g_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs) Thank you.** [ **Yes, I'll join Campus Reform in the fight against leftist tyranny** ](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zelq1qoa366p883gopaff755thg9hc012r0053u0_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h2bs)
---
| | The Leadership Institute 1101 N. Highland St. Steven P.J. Wood Building Arlington VA 22201 United States
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu1aofj0s3mvd163l4pkd53rpsctu3ia3g0q8noo_rp22sh2s8i66ob0sjie2ob6c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Hey Patriot,
My name is Sam. Sorry to drop into your inbox but I only have one quick question on behalf of Republican headquarters. I just combed through our database and -- as of 9:00 AM (EST) -- your name is missing from our official list of Conservatives who pledged to join President Trump's new app.
_Knowing how dedicated you are to our America first movement, we were a bit shocked and disappointed..._
**We know that Big Tech HATES the idea of Trump building his own site WITHOUT blacklists, shadow-banning, and Conservative censorship -- so maybe they're blocking our messages???**

name: RightWave on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: We are at a critical point
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021988:64jeJmo7N:m:1:3317145305:DD62707493F8451C993E6F3AC62C511D:r)
---
| |
Dear Peter,

I hope you're having a great day. There's something important I want to share with you today.

For years, we've seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden administration's education department.

And right now, with the help of these government bureaucrats, they are actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America's schools while teaching destructive ideologies like **critical race theory** and **socialism**.

We are at a key point in our history. We **must** defend our nation's founding documents and principles of liberty through education. And that's why I'm emailing you today.
---
| | Hillsdale College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our very popular **" Constitution 101"** online course, and I'd like you to have a copy.

The course features Hillsdale's faculty, the same professors who teach our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you view **" Constitution 101,"** you'll learn about:
* The original design and purpose of the Constitution.
* The challenges it faced during the Civil War.
* How it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism.
* How limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our own time.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021988:64jeJmo7N:m:1:3317145305:DD62707493F8451C993E6F3AC62C511D:r)
---
| | **Right now, it can be yours when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more. You can take advantage of this limited-time offer using this secure link:

** _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021988:64jeJmo7N:m:1:3317145305:DD62707493F8451C993E6F3AC62C511D:r)_ And when you do, you'll not only get your own DVD box set, but you'll help expand our national educational outreach efforts such as free online courses, classical K-12 education curriculums, and _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty.

We need your support because we REFUSE all government funding, even indirectly in the form of student grants or loans. **So, please reserve your DVD box set with a gift of $100 or more using this secure link:

** [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/constitution-101-dvd/

**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60021988:64jeJmo7N:m:1:3317145305:DD62707493F8451C993E6F3AC62C511D:r) And remember, as I mentioned above, supplies are limited, so be sure to reserve your copy today.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: a love letter to Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
You see, in a lot of ways, this campaign is a love letter to Iowa.
| | |
---
Peter, these past few months I've been traveling to every corner of our beautiful state – from Des Moines to Dubuque, from Waterloo to Winterset. I've met countless voters, and we've had real, meaningful conversations about the future of the state we hold dear.
Every day on the road, I’m reminded of how much I _love_ Iowa: the family farms dotting the long country roads, the warm communities of neighbors and friends, the rolling fields and the quiet sunrises. It's why I'm so proud to have been born and raised here – and why I'm so grateful that my husband and I have built our own life here.
**You see, in a lot of ways, this campaign is a love letter to Iowa.** It's about celebrating our communities and the strength of working families here. It's about giving them a real voice in Washington. It's about winning my home the leadership it deserves. **It's about fighting for Iowans in every corner of our state. ****[If you're with me, can you make your first donation of $5 to defeat Sen. Grassley and expand our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43733848/338459856/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E0NDE3MC01ZmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx9_bUbc1U3XPhIYJj3XY_IOklfBIY3qpHCKGCDGd8s=)**
Sen. Grassley's campaign isn't about any of those things. His campaign is just about spending another six years in Washington on top of the 47 he's already spent there. It's about staying cozy in his nearly-million-dollar D.C. townhouse and rubbing elbows with corporate lobbyists.
**Sen. Grassley's campaign isn't about Iowa – and it's certainly not about fighting for us.**
Iowans deserve better, and we know it, too. **That's why Sen. Grassley's disapproval ratings are the highest they've been in nearly two decades, and why only 27% of likely voters said they want to send him back to Washington for an eighth term.** We can win here and expand our Senate majority – but first, we've got to take on the GOP establishment.
**They've already raised more than $100 MILLION to take back the Senate and defeat Democrats like me, so I'm counting on you to stand up for Iowa with me.** **[Please, before my next fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, make your first donation – anything helps – to win in Iowa, give working families the leadership they deserve and expand our Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43733849/338459859/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E0NDE3MC01ZmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx9_bUbc1U3XPhIYJj3XY_IOklfBIY3qpHCKGCDGd8s=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43733850/338459861/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E0NDE3MC01ZmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx9_bUbc1U3XPhIYJj3XY_IOklfBIY3qpHCKGCDGd8s=)
---
Running this campaign and traveling my state to meet voters is the honor of a lifetime. Thank you for believing in Iowa and in this movement.

– Abby
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. To receive fewer emails, please click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43733851/338459862/496662621?refcode=jtk830-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1N2E0NDE3MC01ZmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jx9_bUbc1U3XPhIYJj3XY_IOklfBIY3qpHCKGCDGd8s=&emci=ee227169-e1b1-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=57a44170-5fb3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13784334#!).

**_Every_ American deserves a voice in government _regardless of where they live._**

So it _should_ be obvious: Washington D.C. deserves statehood.

But Republicans are terrified of enfranchising D.C. residents -- _they’re willing to do anything to keep Washington D.C. from having a voice!_

So we need 7,000 Democratic responses on whether or not the _700,000_ D.C. residents deserve representation. **We need your response by midnight!**
