name: Nan Whaley
subject: only one month left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Nan Whaley
body:
It’s been almost a year since I officially launched my campaign for governor, and I can’t believe how quickly the last twelve months have gone.

Team,

A month from today, we’ll face our biggest challenge yet: the primary.

It’s been almost a year since I officially launched my campaign for governor, and I can’t believe how quickly the last twelve months have gone. We’ve visited all 88 counties, spoken to communities across the state, and made history with the strength of our grassroots movement.

**[But we still have work to do, folks, and none of it is possible if we don’t come out strong in the primary. We only have a month left before this big test – can you chip in $5 to help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43735969/338464274/94154726?refcode=nw_em_220403_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDIzZTUzMi02M2IzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khIep6zoyqVSZl1vO4s_r96EYARcOHedxNnRHn69bWM=)**

I don’t have my own money to pour into my campaign. People like you have helped me create change throughout my entire career without millions of dollars on our side. Hard work and resilience have gotten me this far, not my own money.

Because that’s what Ohioans are about: strength. But our families shouldn’t have to struggle to make ends meet. One good job should be enough. Your government should help you, not hurt you. That’s why I’m in this race. That’s why we need to win this primary.

**[The countdown to the primary has officially begun, and I need your help more than ever. We’re so close to winning this race, but we can’t risk losing any momentum now. Donate $5 to help us make history.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43735970/338464275/94154726?refcode=nw_em_220403_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDIzZTUzMi02M2IzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khIep6zoyqVSZl1vO4s_r96EYARcOHedxNnRHn69bWM=)**

Onward,

Nan Whaley

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43735971/338464276/94154726?refcode=nw_em_220403_1_t2&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDIzZTUzMi02M2IzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=khIep6zoyqVSZl1vO4s_r96EYARcOHedxNnRHn69bWM=)****

name: House Polling Update (good news)
subject: 5X MATCH: We were shocked to see these poll results!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by House Majority PAC, http://www
body:
|
---

| | [**This is huge, friend — last month, we sounded the alarms about a DISASTROUS poll showing Democrats trailing Republicans by ten points.

Then, something amazing happened. Grassroots Democrats got FIRED UP, and we saw donations to save the House Majority soar.**

name: Team Hassan
subject: What are you doing for freedom today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Even as a child, standing up for what's right was important to Maggie.
| | |
---
Growing up, Maggie Hassan didn't set out to become one of the first women in American history ever elected both Governor and Senator.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43737375/338472876/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk863-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjAyMTRlYS02OWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZ0X6I3nDGYNNFy7cjlqloM0xaf-kFsZ46a4M3oTFFM=)
But even as a child, standing up for what's right was important to Maggie. Her father, a WWII veteran who survived the Battle of the Bulge, used to ask her, "What are you doing for freedom today?"
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43737376/338472877/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk863-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjAyMTRlYS02OWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IZ0X6I3nDGYNNFy7cjlqloM0xaf-kFsZ46a4M3oTFFM=)
Inspired by her father, she strives every day to make our democracy stronger, ensure everyone is included in our country's success — and advance the cause of freedom.
**And now, she's running for reelection in a pretty important race – one that very well could decide which party controls the Senate for the next two years. **

---
| Peter,

As I'm sure you know, last month's FEC fundraising deadline marked one of the most consequential moments our campaign has faced to date.

In a true swing district like ours, national Republicans and outside spending groups see an opportunity to flip a seat. That's why **it was so important we reported strong fundraising totals to the FEC to show we have VA-07 's support.**

_**I 'm proud and grateful to report we did just that.**_

Because of committed supporters like you, we reached our fundraising goal and sent a resounding message to our political opponents that we're here to win.

I hope you're as energized by the momentum we're building as I am. [_**If you feel the same, you can continue to build on this moment by making a contribution today.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/8o4w_MnQGA3GDwnx92KtLCd9w6mQ853zBi4T3HYR0Rk=/vF_4HJE9fpmVS3ThwCogadWVgoQPvf-NSdfmZnig_C0=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20220403-1-EM&amount=25)

name: John King
subject: I got a second chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
After my parents passed away, I was kicked out of high school for acting out.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43738761/338480442/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220403&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a99979ee-75b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5NzllZS03NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-3lIAOcSLQMRBI45V3RkziytHgDQ_09Sv6X_J4GV7A=)
---
| Peter,

The difference between me and someone who is sitting in prison today... is luck. I happened to have a set of amazing public educators who gave me a second chance when I needed it most, and if I hadn't, I wouldn't be here today. If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a bit more about how public servants and institutions saved me and gave me real opportunities in life. After my parents passed away when I was a kid, I felt a great deal of anger towards life’s circumstances. Like so many other young people who experience trauma, I channeled this frustration by acting out and eventually got in so much trouble that I was kicked out of high school. While many could have seen a young Black and Puerto Rican kid whose life was in crisis and wrote me off, phenomenal public school teachers, mentors, and a school counselor believed in me and gave me a second chance. **Because of their investment in me, I became the first U.S. Secretary of Education to get kicked out of high school, and I hope I will not be the last. Now, I’m running to be the next governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed.** _**[If you think that’s a message voters should hear, please contribute whatever you can today. Your investment will ensure we have the resources to run ads, build a strong team, and share my story with as many voters as possible.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43738762/338480443/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220403&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a99979ee-75b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5NzllZS03NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-3lIAOcSLQMRBI45V3RkziytHgDQ_09Sv6X_J4GV7A=)**_ My story is not unique. There are thousands of struggling students here in Maryland who are in need of second chances – even third, fourth, and fifth chances — and as governor, I will work to make it happen. **Everyone deserves to be seen, heard, and given a chance to reach their full potential — like I was as a young man — and I will fight for this to become a reality for all Marylanders.** If you agree and are ready to help us deliver real positive change for Maryland, _**[can I count on you to support our campaign with a contribution today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43738763/338480444/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220403&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=25&refcode2=a99979ee-75b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5NzllZS03NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-3lIAOcSLQMRBI45V3RkziytHgDQ_09Sv6X_J4GV7A=)**_ | | | [$5 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43738764/338480445/1974957641?source=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&refcode=email-ngp-20220403-b1_fr_full-JK_S1_C1&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&utm_source=ngp&&&&utm_campaign=20220403&&&&utm_content=b1_fr_full&&&&utm_term=JK_S1_C1&&&&amount=5&refcode2=a99979ee-75b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOTk5NzllZS03NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Y-3lIAOcSLQMRBI45V3RkziytHgDQ_09Sv6X_J4GV7A=)

clean_body: After my parents passed away, I was kicked out of high school for acting out. | = | Peter, The difference between me and someone who is sitting in prison today... is luck. I happened to have a set of amazing public educators who gave me a second chance when I needed it most, and if I hadn't, I wouldn't be here today. If you have a moment, I’d like to tell you a bit more about how public servants and institutions saved me and gave me real opportunities in life. After my parents passed away when I was a kid, I felt a great deal of anger towards life’s circumstances. Like so many other young people who experience trauma, I channeled this frustration by acting out and eventually got in so much trouble that I was kicked out of high school. While many could have seen a young Black and Puerto Rican kid whose life was in crisis and wrote me off, phenomenal public school teachers, mentors, and a school counselor believed in me and gave me a second chance. Because of their investment in me, I became the first U.S. Secretary of Education to get kicked out of high school, and I hope I will not be the last. Now, I’m running to be the next governor of Maryland to ensure others get the same opportunity to succeed. = My story is not unique. There are thousands of struggling students here in Maryland who are in need of second chances – even third, fourth, and fifth chances — and as governor, I will work to make it happen. Everyone deserves to be seen, heard, and given a chance to reach their full potential — like I was as a young man — and I will fight for this to become a reality for all Marylanders. subject: my opponents are pushing Trump’s Big Lie
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak
body:
Friend, I read something shocking this morning that I had to share with you: _“Only one leading Republican candidate for governor in the most competitive states this cycle has said that the 2020 election was legitimate.”[1]_ I’m up against 15 Republican opponents this year – _the most in at least six decades_ – and several of those candidates say the 2020 election was illegitimate. I’m facing a slate of MAGA candidates that are doubling down on pushing Trump’s Big Lie. **[I need your help to push back against their lies and disinformation. We are facing some of the most far-right, fringe candidates in the country here in Nevada’s race for the governor’s seat.
One MAGA candidate was at the January 6th insurrection on the U.S. Capitol. Several candidates loudly support claims of election fraud, despite it being thoroughly debunked. Some refuse to say that Joe Biden is the President.
As governor, I’ve faced relentless efforts by Donald Trump and state Republicans to suppress the vote and undermine our democracy.
I’ll continue the fight against these candidates because I’ll continue to fight for our democracy, and fight to be a voice for Nevadans, not Donald Trump.
**If you’re with me in this fight, please consider making a donation today:**
**[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sisolak-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43738912/338481348/-1382373466?refcode=email_040322_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzcwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWU3ZTJlMi03N2IzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WLR1xn5e1frEvmied_RKuLEpu0180_AFTR9BU47pntw=)**
Thank you for your support,
Steve

name: Freedom First Project
subject: Canceling Twain
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story. Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's _The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn_ by Mark Twain. **Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever. Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ZJFV-GsCD6y931uaIAUbA).
---
| [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.--8roOA)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift-before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of **"Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories"** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._ux0A3wVaSA) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01Vice PresidentNational Donor OutreachHillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, "All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ " Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of **"Mark Twain:**_**Tom Sawyer**_**,**_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories"** right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
P.O. Box 523692, Springfield, VA 22152If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTI2MDY0NDI4MiIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMDkzLWZhOTc5ZjE0NzU1NzQ2NDZiMjBjNTI3YmQzYTdmMWZkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/C2ROhQm85kGsZ6SajEe7CQ) to unsubscribe.

name: Andy Beshear
subject: Taking a moment to say thank you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
Earlier this week, my team and I faced our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline. We set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources to protect the progress we're making for Kentucky. I wanted to take a moment to say thank you, Peter.

Earlier this week, my team and I faced our crucial end-of-month fundraising deadline. We set an ambitious goal to ensure we have the resources to protect the progress we're making for Kentucky.

**This team stepped up in a huge way, and with your help, we reached our end-of-month fundraising goal!**

The 2023 race for governor here in Kentucky will be one of the most important in the whole country, and Republicans are ready to do whatever it takes to win back this seat and undo the progress we're making for Kentuckians. Your support in helping us reach our goal means we're in a better position to tackle any challenges that come our way.

So Peter, let me say: thank you. I'm honored to have your trust and support as we continue our work to build a better future for Kentucky.

Thank you,

Andy | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-q2-2022?refcode=em22_220403_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_220403_eomty_fnd_gq_act___ab_ettx&utm_medium=email)

**Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43727551/338446562/304068380?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk423-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDkxZTMwZS01N2IzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m6eirD_FhwuTy4kpb7bZ2HXyI76ZXxc43MWAx5OnNPg=&emci=6999ced8-76b0-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1491e30e-57b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=25369504)
In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. **Nine other states are considering similar proposals.**

In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – **despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youth are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. **
These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for _everyone_ – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain.

**Earlier this week, I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: **

clean_body: | | | | | Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | Peter, the GOP has chosen their next target in their cultural war against LGBTQ+ rights: children. In Florida, the state Senate passed the “Don’t Say Gay” bill, a measure that will prohibit Florida teachers from discussing topics involving sexual orientation or gender identity in the classroom. Nine other states are considering similar proposals. In Texas, Gov. Greg Abbott instructed the Texas Department of Family and Protective Services to investigate parents providing gender-affirming care to their children as child abuse. And, to make matters worse, the Texas Department of Health and Human Services removed LGBTQ+ resources from its suicide-prevention website – despite the fact that LGBTQ+ youth are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers. These attacks on LGBTQ+ children are unacceptable and sickening. Government officials are supposed to fight for everyone – but instead, these extremist officials are targeting the most vulnerable children in their communities for political gain. Earlier this week, I called on the U.S. Department of Justice to launch a federal investigation into Gov. Abbott’s atrocious attacks on trans children, but the fight for LGBTQ+ rights is far from over. Peter, with an ever-increasing number of attacks on the LGBTQ+ community, I need to know where you stand. So please, let me know ASAP: | | Do you believe LGBTQ+ rights should be protected? | | | | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Every night, millions of people turn on Fox News and are fed far-right disinformation about the war abroad and about politics at home.
#
Derek —
Every night, millions of people turn on Fox News and are fed far-right disinformation about the war abroad and about politics at home.
Many of those people are veterans. The far-right likes it that way. They like to point to the insurrection at the Capitol and say look how many veterans were there. As if that somehow makes it right.
They do this because they know the voices and the actions of veterans matter. They are critical to the debates of our time.
That is just one of the reasons VoteVets works so hard to reach veterans and counter Fox News’ disinformation campaigns.
It’s not easy, but it’s important. It’s not cheap, but we must keep up the fight. And it’s why we are asking for your help:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets to help us reach veterans targeted by the far-rights disinformation campaigns? Friends —
$1.
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today. A lot of people chipped in at the end of the last FEC deadline, it’s true. But we’re not done yet. Mark really needs YOU to help get this one started strong.
So yes. $1.
$1 to help us reach 2 million donations to our campaign.
$1 to help us report an astronomical number of donations when we file our next FEC report.
$1 — most importantly — because it all adds up when so many people who care are chipping in.
By the time you’ve read this message, a bunch of people have donated their $1. Now they’re hoping you’ll do it with them.

Friend,

**I 've always been able to trust you.** It was patriots like you who built this country, and it is patriots like you who are going to SAVE this country.

We are standing up against some of the most sinister forces, entrenched interests, and vicious opponents our people have ever seen. But no matter how big or powerful these Corrupt Radicals may be, you must never forget, **this Nation does NOT belong to THEM --this nation belongs to YOU.**

name: Tim Ryan
subject: $5 for 5 reasons
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=3101%2E3611125%2EcNFqR0 ][IMG]

Folks—[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10255?t=1007&akid=3101%2E3611125%2EcNFqR0 ]I’m about to ask you to chip in $5 toward my grassroots
campaign. But first, I want to tell you why I’m confident we can prove the
skeptics wrong and win this battleground race.

1. Republican Senator Rob Portman is retiring, leaving Ohio’s Senate seat
wide open. Republicans are fighting it out in a messy and expensive
primary—giving us a stronger chance of flipping this seat blue.
2. Ohio already has a Democratic Senator. Sherrod Brown has proven that
Ohioans want to elect a Senator who puts workers first.
3. A recent poll has me within single digits of my Republican opponents.
It’s still early in the race, and the more we get our message out, the
more voters we’ll win over.
4. Working people are fed up and ready for change. I’ve been traveling
all over the state, and Ohioans are sick of handouts for big
corporations and billionaires—they want good-paying jobs, health care
they can afford, and a fair shot for their kids to succeed.
5. We have grassroots momentum. While my rich Republican opponents are
propping up their campaigns with millions of their own dollars, we’re
powered by folks who chip in $5, $25, or $100 at a time.

So, yes, we have a real path to winning this race—but it will
take everything we have to pull it off.

Here’s my ask: [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10255?t=1008&akid=3101%2E3611125%2EcNFqR0 ]Will you chip in $5 or more to help us keep up our
grassroots energy and hit our fundraising goals?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10255?t=1009&akid=3101%2E3611125%2EcNFqR0 ]Chip in $5

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/10256?t=1010&akid=3101%2E3611125%2EcNFqR0 ]Other Amount

Together, I know we can get this done.

—Tim

touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,

For over 25 years Harriet Hageman has been on the FRONT LINES fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming.
She has fought back against Federal agencies that try to usurp our rights with overbearing regulations. And as an attorney:

* She battled Bill Clinton’s attempt to block access to one-third of our National Forest Lands.
* She stopped the EPA’s efforts to take control of our irrigation infrastructure and operations.
* She blocked the USDA from forcing our livestock producers to use radio-frequency ear tags and register all of our ranches with the federal government.
* And more!

clean_body: | | | | Harriet’s Promise | Peter, For over 25 years Harriet Hageman has been on the FRONT LINES fighting for the people of the great State of Wyoming. She has fought back against Federal agencies that try to usurp our rights with overbearing regulations. And as an attorney: She battled Bill Clinton’s attempt to block access to one-third of our National Forest Lands. She stopped the EPA’s efforts to take control of our irrigation infrastructure and operations. She blocked the USDA from forcing our livestock producers to use radio-frequency ear tags and register all of our ranches with the federal government. And more! Instead of protecting the Wyoming energy industry from the radical, Green New Deal policies of Joe Biden and the Democrats in Congress, Liz Cheney spends her time teaming up with them. | It’s time to elect a TRUE leader, it’s time to support Harriet Hageman! Thank you, Team Hageman | | | | | DONATE BY MAIL: Hageman for Wyoming P.O. Box 4157, Cheyenne, Wyoming 82003

We’ll make this quick since it’s the weekend: **Ohio’s Senate primary is ONE MONTH from today.**
That means we have just one month left to #Morganize communities in every corner of our state to get our message out there and get voters to the polls. In fact, Ohioans will start early voting in just DAYS, so time is of the essence.
**[Whatever you contribute right now will go directly toward our organizing efforts. Please, can you chip in today?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30789?t=3&akid=886%2E90090%2EFJgeDx)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30785?refcode=em20220403-886-a&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=886%2E90090%2EFJgeDx)**
There could not be a bigger contrast between Morgan and her opponents. Just take a look at the difference in philosophy around where money comes from to fund the campaigns:
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30788?t=23&akid=886%2E90090%2EFJgeDx)
We’re a scrappy, grassroots campaign and we don’t take a dime of fossil fuel or corporate PAC money. Now more than ever, it’s absolutely critical that we have a steady stream of small-dollar donations coming in — and our grassroots supporters are key to keeping up our efforts.
**[Your contribution matters. That’s why we’re asking, can you rush a donation today to support Morgan?](https://act.morganharper.org/go/30789?t=24&akid=886%2E90090%2EFJgeDx)**
Thank you for your support,
Morgan Harper HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20220403-886-footer&t=25&refcode2=886_90090_FJgeDx&akid=886%2E90090%2EFJgeDx)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/mh4oh/) | [](https://twitter.com/mh4oh) | [](https://www.instagram.com/mh4oh)
Email us: contact@morganharper.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Morgan Harper for Ohio, P.O. Box 15008, Columbus, OH 43215.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.morganharper.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: American Action News
subject: Courage in the face of tyranny
body:
Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zke59m3ofifmd21ap4scg6g5ir4v15v9tqe43joo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2uipn1dhgshrj4d3lcdgm3dj1c4qb3chn65ij4spjcdgr3cr46ip36s5jeloe0s37q9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhmfchhcpq69cr1cup32phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8gq48bi4bh28or1cjg68oj1chjm49fg)
| | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlknolrhrpnuvuaqodqkvqdtuagjklo48k9m2id8_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1i64ob4cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, Perhaps no statesman has displayed more courage in the face of tyranny than Winston Churchill. Not only did he diagnose the threat of modern technology, but he also spoke most effectively against the idea of socialism. So, it should come as no surprise to learn that so many “academics” and activists are working to smear Churchill’s legacy. That’s why studying an accurate account of his accomplishments is more important than ever. And right now, you can do just that when you get a copy of one of Hillsdale College’s most popular online courses, [**“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship,”**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1i0rtc2514dfjskqq8e8ooqrveib7ejo991c9sg_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1i64ob4cth2bs) on DVD.
---
| | Thousands of people have enjoyed this in-depth course online since its release, **and now you can add it to your personal library or give it as a gift.** When you view this close study of Churchill’s words and deeds, you’ll learn timeless lessons that teach:
* The principles and virtues required for great statesmanship.
* How to deal with the threats and opportunities presented by modern technology.
* How to confront the threat of socialism.
* How to serve the cause of our own country as it appears today.

**I am so excited to offer you this powerful DVD set. And it can be yours today when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmltdo4ivnmtoj20nprito46358p4g437rqd1kbo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1i64ob4cth2bs)
---
| | You can reserve your copy using this secure link: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0lk9cnpeec1qr7gnjoj58b9vf1g6bipi43ij9bo_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1i64ob4cth2bs)_ As a student of Dr. Arnn myself, I know that his lectures on Churchill will teach you more about this subject than many other books and videos available today. And they will reveal profound lessons that apply to today’s urgent problems. Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you’ll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift—before they’re gone. You can use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“Winston Churchill and Statesmanship** ” on DVD right now: _[**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/winston-churchill-dvd-offer/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrlko4n7a1j2i0t7s8jvomi7r2lndj7eb8lcvlk0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1i64ob4cth2bs)_ Please enjoy this essential study of Churchill’s words and deeds. Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

[Dear friend,

We’ve warned you before about the Supreme Court’s continued onslaught against voting rights, but it keeps getting worse and worse.
Ahead of the 2022 midterm election, the Supreme Court seems hell-bent on stripping away key provisions of the Voting Rights Act. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040322_B2_AC_30D]
That means our Democratic Secretaries of State will be the last line of defense for voting rights.
The GOP has stalled reform in the Senate while Mitch McConnell and Trump’s handpicked court dismantles voting rights before our very eyes. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040322_B2_AC_30D]
And unless we work overtime to save our Secretaries, that last guard rail could be gone for the 2024 election, setting the stage for electoral CHAOS! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-april22?amount=20&refcode=EM_FR_040322_B2_AC_30D]

Thank you, Peter Willis!
**Because of supporters like you, we hit our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal** — which means we’re in good position to take on the establishment in the June primary and restore power to the people where it belongs.
Since the beginning of 2022, our average online donation is _just $16.95_. That we’re able to build such a strong campaign relying on small-dollar, grassroots donations is a testament to our incredible depth of support both here in NY-03 and across the country.
People are waking up to the fact that progressive policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, universal childcare, and making the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share are not radical — they’re practical ideas rooted in what would provide the most good for the most people at a time when so many are struggling.
Now, with the Democratic primary taking place on June 28, we’re heading into the toughest and most significant phase of this campaign. If there’s one thing we’ve learned in the past few months, it’s that **_electing Democrats is not enough_**. We must send more bold, fearless progressives to Congress who will always fight for working families. And with your help, that’s exactly what we’re going to do.
Thank you so much for building with me,
Melanie

clean_body: | | | | Thank you, Peter Willis! Because of supporters like you, we hit our critical end-of-quarter fundraising goal — which means we’re in good position to take on the establishment in the June primary and restore power to the people where it belongs. Since the beginning of 2022, our average online donation is just $16.95. That we’re able to build such a strong campaign relying on small-dollar, grassroots donations is a testament to our incredible depth of support both here in NY-03 and across the country. People are waking up to the fact that progressive policies like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, universal childcare, and making the ultra-wealthy pay their fair share are not radical — they’re practical ideas rooted in what would provide the most good for the most people at a time when so many are struggling. Now, with the Democratic primary taking place on June 28, we’re heading into the toughest and most significant phase of this campaign. If there’s one thing we’ve learned in the past few months, it’s that electing Democrats is not enough. We must send more bold, fearless progressives to Congress who will always fight for working families. And with your help, that’s exactly what we’re going to do. Thank you so much for building with me, Melanie ** Melanie D'Arrigo is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. ** | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MELANIE DARRIGO (not by corporations or lobbyists) Friends of Melanie D'Arrigo P.O. name: Derek Marshall
subject: UPDATE: We did it!
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88122/images/Derek%20Marshall%20Logo%20-%20Standard%20Stacked%20Lockup%20JTree%20MAIN%20COLOR.png]
Peter,
I'm thrilled to share that we have made incredible progress as a campaign in the last three months. Since I launched this campaign in 2021, I have been blown away by the support we've received from all corners of the state and country.
And now we've reached new milestones to celebrate. We far surpassed our fundraising of every other quarter of our campaign to date and set a campaign record for funds raised this past quarter . And that's not all.
We have officially passed half a million dollars raised cycle-to-date! That's a huge number, and a huge win not just for me, but everyone who has contributed their time, energy, and resources to this campaign.
This campaign is really heating up, and we have to reach ambitious goals every week here on out from now until the primary. That's starting this weekend with our very first Weekend of Action, where we'll launch our official field program.
In other words, we can only go up from here. I hope that as we move forward, you'll continue to stay engaged and involved, because we need all hands on deck to flip this district blue. Thank you for all your support so far. Let's do this!
In solidarity,
Derek Marshall
Candidate for U.S. Congress, CA-23
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dm-april?refcode=4-2&amount=38]
Meet Derek [www.DerekMarshallCA.com]

P.O. Box 2836, Victorville, CA 92395 • (760) 486-2416 [tel:(760) 486-2416]
Twitter [https://twitter.com/derekmarshallca] | Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/DerekMarshallCA] | Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/derekmarshallca]

name: Holly McCormack
subject: My rural revival plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress**
body:
This is how we win votes

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741552/338496836/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220403RuralRevival_N_HM_90do_6_N_TESTB_LOGO&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNmMzI5Ny05MWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxG34VYRshbd-eWf-426_QPW60SvBpiauSO4nv8bkW8=)
Peter, this is going to be a longer email, so I hope you stay with me.
**We have less than 60 DAYS until our May 24 primary.** And right now, I’m the only candidate in this race that actually has a plan to help my community.
A lot of people write off my part of Georgia. They think that Marjorie Taylor Greene is representative of the whole district. **But she isn’t, not even close.**
The reality is, when people feel like no one is there to help them, sometimes they turn to the loudest person in the room. Doesn’t matter how wrong that person is, how ridiculous, at least that person is saying something!
But when you actually tell people how you think the federal government should listen to them and help them, well, then they turn away from people like Marjorie Taylor Greene. **That’s exactly what my rural revival plan does.**
_Here’s my plan:_
1\. More broadband to rural areas of my district – which will bring jobs.
2\. Building an additional VA hospital and creating a veteran’s cemetery to honor the veterans who are the backbone of this district.
3\. Investing in our children and ending the childcare desert that plagues my community.
If we just try to be the Democratic version of Marjorie, chasing headlines and being flashy, then Marjorie Taylor Greene will certainly return to Congress in 2023. I’m asking you to support me, because I have actual plans for voters in our district.
**[Peter, it’s getting close to crunch time, so I’m going to personally ask. Can you make a $5 or more contribution right now to help me win the primary and defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741554/338496838/-744162797?refcode=EM_FR_220403RuralRevival_N_HM_90do_6_N_TESTB_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDNmMzI5Ny05MWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SxG34VYRshbd-eWf-426_QPW60SvBpiauSO4nv8bkW8=)**

name: Val Demings
subject: That's me! [photo attached]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
It was my parents' words that inspired me
| | |
---
Friend,

That's me you're looking at.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741617/338497239/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2831-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTkyZjViYS05MWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CC4lcgLQrFZ7lZYSWUrmWEml5TdVmFS7q9Pj33gk5zU=)I grew up poor in the segregated South, the daughter of a maid and a janitor. If you had told me back then, as a young Black girl, that I would become the first in my family to graduate college, the first woman to lead the Orlando Police Department, a congresswoman and a candidate for the U.S. Senate, well – I just don't know if I would have believed you. What I _did_ believe then – and what I carry deep in my soul to this day – is the lesson from my hardworking parents to "never tire of doing good."
It was my parents' words that inspired me to get into public service. It was their words that have driven me to do good every chance I get. From my time as a young social worker to my career as a law enforcement officer to my work representing my community in Congress – "never tire" is a mantra that I've held dear.
My unlikely story of opportunity is proof of what is possible and what should be possible for every American. **As Florida's next U.S. senator, I will _never tire_ in the work to make sure the greatness of America is accessible and affordable for all Americans. **I will _never tire_ in continuing to do more good for you and your family.
But when it comes to this race, the GOP won't tire either: The Republican National Committee chair is already attacking me personally, while Mitch McConnell and GOP outside groups are ready to dump tens of MILLIONS into Florida to defeat me.

This is already shaping up to be the most expensive Senate election _ever –_ and with Florida's last Senate race being decided by a narrow 0.12% margin, every dollar we raise will count tremendously. **I know a thing or two about winning tough races, but I need your help because I can't do this alone.**
**[I'm depending on your grassroots support to power this historic campaign and help me fight back against the GOP's attacks – and right now, I'm falling short of my midnight goal. Can you make a $5 donation today to help make sure I have the resources to defeat Marco Rubio and protect and expand Democratic Senate control?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741618/338497240/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk2831-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTkyZjViYS05MWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CC4lcgLQrFZ7lZYSWUrmWEml5TdVmFS7q9Pj33gk5zU=)**

Val Demings

name: Alexander Bush
subject: Kelly Schulz for Governor – MoCo Organizational Meeting
body:
Hi – as a Montgomery County resident who would love to see eight more years of competent leadership in Maryland, I hope you will join us at the Kelly Schulz for Governor Organizational Meeting for Montgomery County.

Monday, April 11, 2022
7:00 pm

909 Rose Avenue (in Pike & Rose)
1st Floor Conference Room
North Bethesda, Maryland 20852

If you have any questions, please contact me by email or at 240-660-0129.

Sincerely,
Alexander A. Bush
MCGOP Chair 2018-2020

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: We are at a critical point
body:
For years, we’ve seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation t
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zd2ggt3f26qvhq6g41cr3ge8vt2pccm0aud3745g_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1h68ob6cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sjks2q75cjmcupm8p9ieaob8c72m1ojcobgsoob7dlj6dr74chlm1jj2phjmko6fkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj3ap5l61jr5cb66lhb6phnm2qmash5u)
| | | This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zvu46q3opggv5b7fjpiblpnnc8q59teb8lm84re0_rp22sh2s8i66ob4s1h68ob6cph2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a great day. There’s something important I want to share with you today. For years, we’ve seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden administration’s education department. And right now—with the help of these government bureaucrats—they are actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America’s schools while teaching destructive ideologies like **critical race theory** and **socialism**. We are at a key point in our history. We **must** defend our nation’s founding documents and principles of liberty through education. And that’s why I’m emailing you today.
---
| | Hillsdale College recently produced a limited number of DVD box sets of our very popular **“Constitution 101”** online course, and I’d like you to have a copy. The course features Hillsdale’s faculty—the same professors who teach our required course on the Constitution on campus. And when you view **“Constitution 101,”** you’ll learn about:
* The original design and purpose of the Constitution.
* The challenges it faced during the Civil War.
* How it has been undermined for over a century by progressivism and liberalism.
* How limited government under the Constitution might be revived in our own time.

---

There’s something important I want to share with you today. For years, we’ve seen a growing effort from radical activists to destroy the principles of liberty that have made our nation the freest and most prosperous in history. These radicals have found a willing ally in the Biden administration’s education department. And right now—with the help of these government bureaucrats—they are actively denigrating the U.S. Constitution in America’s schools while teaching destructive ideologies like critical race theory and socialism. name: Team Barletta
subject: Team Barletta Campaign Update
body: | | | | Updates from the trail --- --- Peter Willis, Coming to you live with another campaign update from Lou's time on the trail. There has been a TON of momentum for Team Barletta in the last two weeks and we couldn't be happier where things stand. _**In the last 2 weeks alone Lou has traveled 2,268 miles across PA and hit 9 different counties along the way as he continues to campaign at a furious pace across every corner of our Commonwealth: Dauphin, Allegheny, Erie, Schuylkill, Bucks, Cumberland, Luzerne, Lackawanna, and Chester.**_ Another public poll was released last week and it says the same thing as the rest of the polls: Lou is in a statistical tie for first place within the margin of error with no other candidate polling anywhere near double digits despite spending millions of dollars on TV ads over the last several months. The grassroots energy and momentum continues to grow and we will continue to outwork everyone else on the ground on our way to victory on May 17th! --- _**LOU IN THE NEWS**_ **Penn Live:**[_Pa. GOP governor hopefuls share their views on issues at conservative clean_body: | | | | Updates from the trail Peter Willis, Coming to you live with another campaign update from Lou's time on the trail. There has been a TON of momentum for Team Barletta in the last two weeks and we couldn't be happier where things stand. In the last 2 weeks alone Lou has traveled 2,268 miles across PA and hit 9 different counties along the way as he continues to campaign at a furious pace across every corner of our Commonwealth: Dauphin, Allegheny, Erie, Schuylkill, Bucks, Cumberland, Luzerne, Lackawanna, and Chester. Another public poll was released last week and it says the same thing as the rest of the polls: Lou is in a statistical tie for first place within the margin of error with no other candidate polling anywhere near double digits despite spending millions of dollars on TV ads over the last several months. The grassroots energy and momentum continues to grow and we will continue to outwork everyone else on the ground on our way to victory on May 17th! LOU IN THE NEWS Penn Live: York Daily Record: " " Times-Leader: " " Standard Speaker: " " Pittsburgh Post Gazette: " " Barletta Campaign: " " Politics PA : " " Despite his opponents spending $10M+ in the primary, a new public poll continues to show Lou in a statistical tie for first place in the GOP primary race for PA Gov. Check out Lou's interview on the Volpe Report where he discusses energy, crime, state of the campaign and much more. Other clips can be found by clicking. NEW ENDORSEMENTS Glad to have State Rep. Aaron Kaufer on the team! HIGHLIGHTS FROM THE TRAIL Lou's grandson Christopher is one of our top campaign volunteers and might be in the running for a full-time campaign surrogate position! Lou packed out an entire VFW in Dupont in Luzerne Co! The grassroots momentum is real and we will continue to outwork the competition each and every day until we win in November! Common sense for the Commonwealth! Lou and Mary Grace couldn’t have asked for a better time at the Asian Indian Americans of Central PA Gala in Camp Hill! Great response from voters (and future voters) at the Scranton St. Patrick's Day Parade! It's not everyday where a Stanley Cup Champion and NHL Hall of Famer put on a fundraiser for you! Thanks to Mark and Kim Recchi for putting together a great event in Gibsonia! Started the day in Erie and ended it at the Schuylkill County GOP Lincoln Day Dinner! Thank you to all the grassroots supporters who continue to power our campaign! Great time in Harrisburg at the County Commissioners Spring Conference! Having good relationships with County Commissioners is vital to good governance. As a former mayor, Lou knows full well what it’s like when you feel like your concerns fall on deaf ears. Great meeting with the National Association of Insurance & Financial Advisors in Harrisburg! While Governor Wolf and Josh Shapiro may deem the insurance industry as "nonessential", under a Barletta administration our finance and insurance professionals will always have a seat at the table. Great to have Curt Coccodrilli and Dave Weber from Lou's 2A Advisory Board join him on the trail at the NEPA NRA Banquet in Dickson City! Make no mistake: if Josh Shapiro becomes governor he will not hesitate to come after our guns. Our constitutional rights are on the ballot this election. While Lou was on the road, the grandkids were out early for the opening day of trout season! Pennsylvania's outdoor recreation is second to none. We just need a governor like Lou who will promote it to the world. HELP LOU KEEP THE MOMENTUM GOING! Lou is leading in the polls despite his opponents spending $10M+ because he is powered by the people. Help Lou keep the grassroots momentum going by chipping in $25, $50, $100 or more TODAY! CHECK OUT THE LATEST LOU BARLETTA MERCH! For Liberty, Team Barletta | | | | ==

body:
Texas is ready — It's time to legalize cannabis.I support the legalization of recreational & medicinal cannabis in Texas. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas/2022-13618658?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=4a6ac34cdc&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , Texas is ready — It's time to legalize cannabis. [**I support the legalization of recreational and medicinal cannabis in Texas**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2c327ad69a&e=5d8d80652b) and will lead a statewide effort to make this happen. Why is that? Here are a few of the reasons: **For medical treatment.** Cannabis provides our veterans and those suffering from illness a wellness alternative to addicting opioids. **For jobs.** Legalized recreational and medicinal cannabis will be a money maker for Texas. How does 30,000 permanent jobs, $1.1 billion in revenue to add to the state budget and $300 million statewide savings for police and prosecutors sound? It sounds like smart progress to me. **For criminal justice reform.** And finally, I must simply ask: how many young lives, principally lives of color, are we going to permanently burden and put in private prisons so that people can make a profit off of their incarceration? **We, as Texans, must stand up and demand better.** **[](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2b543206b4&e=5d8d80652b)** I have campaigned all across our state for nearly two years sharing my plan to legalize cannabis in Texas and protect responsible cannabis use by adults. [**Will you stand with me and support my campaign to be your next Attorney General?**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=8dc15b8c79&e=5d8d80652b) We must demand common sense solutions from our elected officials. Cannabis legalization is a solution that will make a huge difference in the lives of the people of Texas. For medical treatment, jobs, and most importantly, for criminal justice reform. For all of these reasons and more, I support cannabis reform. Elect me as your next Attorney General, and next year I will testify before the Texas House and Senate in support of cannabis legalization.

[**Donate today to help me continue to spread this message all over our state.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=c9a775ec10&e=5d8d80652b) All the best, Joe

Recent polls show Trump’s handpicked candidate, Herschel Walker, **_statistically TIED_** with Senator Raphael Warnock in what NBC calls **“2022's most important swing state” \--** and now Republican megadonors are pouring _millions_ into Georgia!

**Losing even ONE Democratic seat would flip the Senate back into Mitch McConnell’s control,** which is why **we’ve set an emergency $25,000 fundraising goal to counter the GOP’s megadonors.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Steve?=
subject: FW: I'm in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roberts for Congress, James Hill, Treasurer_
body:
Steve's ready to bring people together & deliver results! | |
---
| | |
## Dear friend - I'm hoping you got a chance to read the email from Steve - we've had a tremendous response since Friday and we wanted to [make sure you had the opportunity to join the team!](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=07caeee498&e=a088917f89)

We're running against the multi-million dollar machine - but that's ok because we've got supporters like you. I hope you'll [join us and chip in $5](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=16add62417&e=a088917f89) or any amount you can - it will absolutely go a long way towards winning this campaign and bringing people together and delivering results for everyone in St. Louis!

Onward!

~ Team Steve

I’d like to take a moment and tell you, directly, that I’m in the race for Congress!

I’ll share more about the journey to this point in a moment, but first I must respectfully ask: Can you help jump start this campaign as we are running against the multi-million-dollar machine who are already slinging false, negative political hits against us. [Can I count on you for a $5 contribution towards our grassroots campaign for Congress?](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=4efb8949cd&e=a088917f89)
---
|
---
| [Chip In $5](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=18a13232e4&e=a088917f89 "Chip In $5")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=eac7c122e0&e=a088917f89)
---
###
Our primary election is just four months away – our opponent and her supporters are already spending millions against us but with your help, we can share our vision of bringing people together and delivering results throughout the 1st district.

I jumped in this race after months of people encouraging me to run. I’m in it to win it – and together we will run our grassroots campaign of bringing people together and delivering results for every family in St Louis – city and county!

We have an uphill climb, especially with the multimillion-dollar machine our opponent is using. [Your generous donation today of $5, or any amount you can, will make a huge difference in this race.](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=3e7ba294d0&e=a088917f89)

| [Chip In $5](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=feceee28f6&e=a088917f89 "Chip In $5")
---
|
###
I know I’m asking a lot, but $5 will make such a big difference in taking on the DC machine.

Best,

~ Steve
---
| | |
---
| _Paid for by Roberts for Congress, James Hill, Treasurer_

**www.robertsforcongress.com**

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b361e26361&e=a088917f89&c=d1ebcaa038) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://robertsforstl.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6e3f7ee3b541518ea63c7e773&id=b361e26361&e=a088917f89&c=d1ebcaa038).

name: =?UTF-8?Q?American_Energy_Survey_=F0=9F=93=8B?=
subject: [[RESPONSE NEEDED]] - Energy Independence
body:
Peter,
America should depend on NO other country.

For too long, we’ve been dependent on our enemies for the energy our country runs on.

_A world without American leadership would be a very dark one, and without American energy independence, that world may turn into a reality._

We’re working to push for American energy independence, but we need your help.

**If we can show Washington that our citizens OVERWHELMINGLY support American-made energy, we can build the momentum we need to make energy independence a reality.**

[**Take our “American Energy” survey TODAY and let us know if YOU support American energy independence.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=ea9ee7ee6f3a4e12b9bfc6ea8d0faef1&_e=Gk-XJz7KBZrLNFd58sphU9CsseRR1FOgstqFDtsfOaZcvTt7XC8R20hIottIqoAfpccRBPCorezflFC_q_y5fCRqD661D-d35nI7YAaESOBAyMJAt2PsNPMCA7qbXHvV6uBVc9dx2w4ORjfDyzV8Eb1Dqb9TWLZN5OPElYA3TBdTyuN-O_6Y-RKAE9-OfVwvVAboBquHTiGGjyqMSLpq4cZgGgSuYAuKlOHnGj2igB_38NFZ_3f1gNYxiqah0db4un_3eBKMvf_pqSc7Nb-jftUunIV-C6tylPFnWO5-31HXLRzGbZz3arcCPrln-AjIRGru2ONqkwr0lTsaJnM8bVtvJK2ApAhNtessBZiyv5WYPxeiqG_c3k89OXEspaY9dlnyfoXgBGUMUh_hGDbMiuYNIS4NmjAQIgoAMSRTxTM%3D) **Should America be 100% energy independent?** [**YES**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=ea9ee7ee6f3a4e12b9bfc6ea8d0faef1&_e=Gk-XJz7KBZrLNFd58sphU9CsseRR1FOgstqFDtsfOaZcvTt7XC8R20hIottIqoAfpccRBPCorezflFC_q_y5fCRqD661D-d35nI7YAaESOBAyMJAt2PsNPMCA7qbXHvV6uBVc9dx2w4ORjfDyzV8Eb1Dqb9TWLZN5OPElYA3TBdTyuN-O_6Y-RKAE9-OfVwvcW3Zh9zvAXSlqbdk_WVm5jEthffK7oJ600cVA9vzTwOjhSUDn95cXUDM1jBkwEF0TbDwA_pHu7tioIc8zlGioNP5-DzVZKZK3MiRxFrOWJH-RB4KVtGqqH68P-NFEWnrwglBp55dUacimF3dYpkDReJu88VuZcNNzIIGz-cs9GPVZGp-0xwmtLqt1N-WJZ0IZ6-D8o0PZM6cP5qcz7xa_vKKGTPcSzpTI6K7URuqTFM%3D) [**NO**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=ea9ee7ee6f3a4e12b9bfc6ea8d0faef1&_e=Gk-XJz7KBZrLNFd58sphU9CsseRR1FOgstqFDtsfOaZcvTt7XC8R20hIottIqoAfpccRBPCorezflFC_q_y5fCRqD661D-d35nI7YAaESOBAyMJAt2PsNPMCA7qbXHvV6uBVc9dx2w4ORjfDyzV8Eb1Dqb9TWLZN5OPElYA3TBdTyuN-O_6Y-RKAE9-OfVwvV3d_vDCc6QOFHX_9eX2fXQsTS2JUaBDNjs-G6jPNr01uVxK1H54WtM9jGqLz6w7xEmPEaa-SNzB8gSLocbDlZlWFxCyUrAjeb2-eABi0kq1KNo2YdTZRtOxWyAnudQ9kPs8Ou2ieAbqDsYB_VL7G7swLaCMavzSf-hO2MOoxj0Nn56R9QnKrdY38LKbJlUVOsscPUy-LcERnmKi5HvXEtImqmv8BEzBo1DUEUktKgvM%3D) Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida Contributions to this committee are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Rick Scott for Florida. If you no longer wish to receive emails, please click here: [unsubscribe](http://links.voterickscott.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_s=ea9ee7ee6f3a4e12b9bfc6ea8d0faef1&_t=qQ8TvmGP1mtYkXw2ag7Obs2-7hXbhb9_ahUCR8F8gc817IAgVzwpPCg0ShzU4lnRLe7S3eo9r00tZyPMhI8eAmBCy9dcYfbAhd_Pyy_Y1ZzqZxkUKZNNhLZ6p4ziNnRgg2cx788gREpfFIhGZGdojc-OLstnzpAzk2TlP23SlzU%3D). Taking back the U.S. Senate is no small task. 5 Republicans are retiring, and we must win all those races and one more. We need patriots from across the country to join the fight and do their part to help win back the Senate majority. This is a team effort! Please make a [contribution](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=ea9ee7ee6f3a4e12b9bfc6ea8d0faef1&_e=Gk-XJz7KBZrLNFd58sphU9CsseRR1FOgstqFDtsfOaZcvTt7XC8R20hIottIqoAfae_lEa43AXCAmUMOe_PWjVSGMz3NkdRmSC6HZYRJmzhAQFqnnd8pBOOfe8QgSdTh34vsLG0tgHy3k9poXRsift-zo8lBUsN-ie5APztlOz4CoJmNGabx0qLmw3yW_QijdeXjNq1Qav-kDHZZzh3FhTo1P001padStlGHe5T2hmOTXrDn7OcXJTiLDWAuicNb2unTl8LXf3YmzChYLLG2TLPK4fMfUkRYSCBaf3zLdaWiirllF1Pqk6wCur5XFwMOUNCPUgXRjAVvj5dSkJ3jEb2ZvHoeMfxVD1r2pPcCMGAH488mMV_CFImx4ojZWjdJ1XTNw163kPLOLcUk1pDc_A%3D%3D) today to help our campaign do our part to take back America. Thank you for your ongoing support of me and Senate Republicans.

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: You've got mail
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
Will you take a moment to sign my important petition to protect USPS?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742148/338500249/-969659392?code=mh-jtk871-su-nd&refcode=mh-jtk871-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrRmIuM4jrnxudraxjh51ek9a8oh3o6EGFPHTMqgV8E=&emci=2c228af1-02b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9dff431b-9ab3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893)
---
This is important –
Whether it's mail from a grandchild or a life-saving medication, people across the country rely on the U.S. Postal Service. Yet burdensome requirements have made it more difficult for the agency to provide efficient and reliable service, particularly in rural communities.
That's why I worked across the aisle to pass the Postal Service Reform Act. This bipartisan legislation will improve the agency's long-term financial stability, ensure reliable and timely deliveries, and support postal workers. And the best part is, it's headed to the President's Desk.
I'm pleased that Republicans and Democrats could come together to strengthen the Postal Service, which provides a vital service for millions of Americans.
[**If you agree with this bipartisan legislation, please add your name below to support and protect the U.S. Postal Service:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742149/338500256/445149712?code=mh-jtk871-su-nd&refcode=mh-jtk871-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrRmIuM4jrnxudraxjh51ek9a8oh3o6EGFPHTMqgV8E=&emci=2c228af1-02b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9dff431b-9ab3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893)
| | [Add My Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742150/338500258/445149712?code=mh-jtk871-su-nd&refcode=mh-jtk871-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZGZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KrRmIuM4jrnxudraxjh51ek9a8oh3o6EGFPHTMqgV8E=&emci=2c228af1-02b2-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9dff431b-9ab3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=5452893)

name: RightUSA on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: What Hemingway said
body:
| Please view this message from our sponsor. | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American,

You may be shocked to learn that thousands of public schools have recently banned a classic American story.

Even if you haven't read the book, you know the name. It's "_The Adventures of Huckleberry Finn "_ by Mark Twain.

**Unfortunately, political correctness has taken this literary classic out of the hands of far too many young Americans.** But here at Hillsdale College, we're working to safeguard the legacy of this treasured classic, along with the legacy of the man regarded by many as **America's greatest author.**
---
| | [**That is why I want to offer you a special DVD box set of our fascinating and important online course, "****Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories****.** "

](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r) Twain's realist fiction reveals timeless truths about human nature. And while American life has certainly changed since the 1800s, human nature has not. So these literary works are as relevant and as important as ever.

Now, we have created a special DVD version of our course that includes all nine lectures. And today, [**I'd like to send you this DVD box set as our way of thanking you for supporting our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r).
---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r)
---
| | Only a limited number of these DVD sets are available, so I hope you'll take this opportunity to add it to your personal library or give it as a gift before they're gone (or removed from your local library!). You can use this secure link to get your copy of "**Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer, Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories "** on DVD: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College P.S. Another great author, Ernest Hemingway, once said, All modern American literature comes from one book by Mark Twain called _Huckleberry Finn._ Don't let this classic disappear forever. Get your DVD box set of "**Mark Twain: **_**Tom Sawyer**_**, **_**Huckleberry Finn**_**, and Selected Short Stories " **right now when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more at this secure link: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-mark-twain****.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60022261:6VGuxmo3N:m:1:3253819041:670A07F48B685941C9B88D128325BB8B:r)

name: Admiral Mike Franken
subject: Fox News put our troops in jeopardy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742525/338502304/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjE1OTRjYi1hMWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy5bqm7cAm1wRwojHWsFTrJc0A32JNREd3PESRg66Go=&emci=7e8bd065-96b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f1594cb-a1b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742526/338502305/301434390?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjE1OTRjYi1hMWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy5bqm7cAm1wRwojHWsFTrJc0A32JNREd3PESRg66Go=&emci=7e8bd065-96b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3f1594cb-a1b3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=6371843)
Hello,
As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton.
As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.”
And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. **Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump.**
As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices.
Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president.
Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. **My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug.**
If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation.
**The polls show we can win.** The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate.
**We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – every dollar you can spare before midnight tonight – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic Senate majority? **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742527/338502306/-42398318?refcode=em20220403pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjE1OTRjYi1hMWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dy5bqm7cAm1wRwojHWsFTrJc0A32JNREd3PESRg66Go=)

clean_body: Hello, As bombs began raining down on Ukrainian cities, Donald Trump called into Fox News to blame – you guessed it – Joe Biden and Hillary Clinton. As Russian tanks began pouring over the Ukrainian border, Fox News host Laura Ingraham had the gall to call Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky “pathetic.” And if you tune into Tucker Carlson these days, you’ll see a show that might as well have been written and produced by Russian state media. Fox News showcases the chasm between traditional GOP normative behavior and the fringe-right cabal now headed by Donald J. Trump. As the commander of military forces in East Africa, I asked the American Forces Network to replace Fox News during meal hours for troops. Why? Because they were harmful to America's outreach overseas. They put our troops in jeopardy and made my job harder. Today, they have accomplices. Without Fox News, Trump would have only ever been a bungling celebrity who foolishly and laughably ran for president. Real-time reckoning of lies needs real-time litigation. There is such a thing as gross distortions of fact and purveyors of such must pay a debilitating price. My answer to Fox when I was an admiral in the U.S. Navy? I pulled the plug. If I defeat Chuck Grassely and turn Iowa blue this November, I will be the most senior military person ever elected to the United States Senate. And I think it’s about time we had more people in leadership who understand the true costs of war and media manipulation of facts, commonly called disinformation. The polls show we can win. The pundits say we must win. And with your help today, we can fight back against McConnell’s Super PAC lies and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate. We need to raise another $15,000 before midnight tonight, but right now, we’re still falling dangerously short. If we’re going to defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue, I need grassroots donors like you to give now: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Fox News’ propaganda cannot go unanswered. But it takes significant funding to run a full-scale campaign and take on all of Grassley’s and McConnell’s lies. I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so whatever you can give today will go a long way. I am so thankful to have you on the team, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.)
