subject: Fwd: Sen. Grassley says women are afraid of hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
Tomorrow, the Senate Judiciary Committee will vote on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's nomination to the Supreme Court.
Hi there Peter,
---
**Tomorrow, the Senate Judiciary Committee will vote on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's nomination to the Supreme Court.** Today, I'm thinking about this message (below) from Abby, and why we cannot let Grassley ever take control of this incredibly important committee again.
During his time as chair, Grassley has used his leadership role to advance his far-right agenda and delay crucial hearings for _months._ He weaponized one of the most influential committees in the Senate as part of a hyperpartisan scheme between him, Mitch McConnell and their extremist allies. He even had the gall to claim that so few women have served on the committee because they don't want to deal with the heavy workload.
It's time to kick Grassley off this critical committee – and out of Washington altogether. It's time to elect a new leader who will cut through the noise of political partisanship and do her job in the Senate. There's no one who can do that better than Abby.
**That's why the GOP is so afraid of her – and why they're doing everything they can to stop her campaign.[We cannot let them win. So please, before the Judiciary Committee takes this historic vote, will you rush $5 to elect Abby and defeat Grassley?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742912/338503598/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ODY3ZS1hMmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMQiCmYDlSGqja_CCge1moYGGHMiW0ypeyC7a6Xou3M=)**
Thank you,

Amanda (Abby's campaign manager)
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Abby Finkenauer**
Date: Thu, Mar 24, 2022
Subject: Sen. Grassley says women are afraid of hard work
| | |
---
Peter,

With hearings taking place for President Biden's Supreme Court nominee, Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson, I wanted to take a moment to talk about Sen. Grassley (R-IA) and his role on the Senate Judiciary Committee.
This committee, which has existed for more than 200 years and is incredibly influential, was composed entirely of men until the 1990s.
If you ask just about anyone why so few women have served, they'll point to the historical barriers that women face and the out-of-touch elites who run far too much of Washington **–** **but when reporters asked Sen. Grassley, he told them it's because****women just don't want to do the work.**
**When I tell you his comments fire me up, I mean it.** **[Peter: I promise you no one is going to work harder than I will to defeat Sen. Grassley and fight for working families in Washington. Please, will you stand with me and chip in $5 right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742913/338503599/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ODY3ZS1hMmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMQiCmYDlSGqja_CCge1moYGGHMiW0ypeyC7a6Xou3M=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742914/338503600/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ODY3ZS1hMmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMQiCmYDlSGqja_CCge1moYGGHMiW0ypeyC7a6Xou3M=)
---
Beliefs like these have no place anywhere in our society, but especially not in the U.S. Senate. **Trust me, women do not fear hard work – growing up, I watched as my mom and my grandma worked hard to care for our family and give back to their communities. I took their work ethic to heart because I know that it takes many hard days’ work to win real victories for the people you serve.**
**First in the Iowa State House and then in the U.S. House, it was my priority to deliver for the folks who elected me.** Chuck Grassley, on the other hand, has made it his mission to politicize our courts: blocking President Obama's nominee for 293 days, ramming through Kavanaugh's controversial appointment and refusing to properly listen to Dr. Blasey Ford's testimony.
It's time for change. **With your help, this November, I'll become the youngest woman ever elected to the U.S. Senate – and I'll keep working every day to defeat the right's out-of-touch radical agenda.**** **
**[**So please, with all eyes on the Supreme Court nomination process this week, will you stand with me by making a $5 donation right now to defeat Sen. Grassley, flip this seat blue and move our country forward?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742915/338503601/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ODY3ZS1hMmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMQiCmYDlSGqja_CCge1moYGGHMiW0ypeyC7a6Xou3M=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742916/338503602/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk859-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzE0ODY3ZS1hMmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PMQiCmYDlSGqja_CCge1moYGGHMiW0ypeyC7a6Xou3M=)

Thank you for your support. Together, I know we can win.

– Abby

Friend, the U.S. Postal Service is a critical public service, delivering everything from daily mail to lifesaving medical supplies. In recent months, millions of Americans have depended on the USPS to ship COVID-19 tests provided by the Biden administration to keep them and their families safe. But this critical public service was thrown under the bus by the Trump administration.
**FIRST:** Trump BLOCKED USPS funding in the middle of the pandemic and handpicked the Board of Governors who selected Trump megadonor Louis DeJoy to be postmaster general.
**THEN:** DeJoy started cutting USPS hours and facilities – delaying the delivery of Medicare prescriptions, Social Security benefits and groceries.
**NOW:****DeJoy is at it again, this time enacting plans that reduce post office hours, increase prices and MASSIVELY slow down deliveries – including of the Biden administration's free COVID tests, a key part of our country's pandemic response.**
We need action NOW to remove DeJoy and save the Postal Service. **But we can't stop him without grassroots support, so we need to hear from 51 more people in 18326 by midnight tonight. Please, friend, tell us now:**

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Conservatives are ready for Tuesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin
body:
Help them get over the finish line!

| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2daysout_1&n=1)
---
Hi Friend -- Despite the April snow, our teams across the state are hard at work knocking on doors and talking to voters. You all know what is on the line with these elections. After two years of school closures, mask mandates, learning loss, and curtails on Wisconsinites’ freedoms, conservatives are motivated to free their local governments from far-left overreach. The efforts over these final days will have lasting impacts on the future of your county and local governments! Check out some of the action from yesterday! **[Don't sit this election out! Sign up to help these candidates across the finish line.](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2daysout_1&n=2)** [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2daysout_1&n=3) **[Check Out This Awesome Video from Washington County Event with Senator Johnson](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8ToWKKQOQU-EgFmTLMto1KK0cEHJAoSOwqDZN5YxlI5d2i__TI1FzXpe-3GA8pYSg1DdygY2kFWsHjdYTPz3fS63SugMA5DKx_ibrJgT6h0Tj&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2daysout_1&n=4 "https://twitter.com/wcrp_wi/status/1510354310495981568?s=11&t=YL5rhoZeIIAUQta7S1-blA")**
* * *
**** Our friendly March Metric Madness voter contact competition enters our final round. **Kenosha, La Crosse, Waukesha, and the Young Republicans** will face off over the final 3 days to see who will conduct the most voter contact and be crowned champion.🏆🏆 The previous round had some close matchups:
* The Young Republican door deployment to help Sam Kerkman for Kenosha County Executive helped push the Young Republicans past the tough matchup of Calumet county.
* Speaking of Kenosha, they have consistently been one of the top performing counties and will look to carry this momentum into Election Day!
* A matchup between two power-house counties in the 3rd district saw ** _La Crosse edge out a 13-point win over Eau Claire._**... That is right... a total of 13 doors made the difference....OOOF.... **It only goes to show you how important these doors are in the next few days. 😄**
* Waukesha is no stranger to being the highest producing voter contact county in the state. Their WISRED local candidate initiative is supporting over 150 candidates in every corner of the county. They are ready to prove why they are called Crucial Waukesha county.

| [](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eXv_5DaexUSZI9PlfXgIO8&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2daysout_1&n=5 "Help local candidates today!") clean_body: Help them get over the finish line! | Hi Friend -- Despite the April snow, our teams across the state are hard at work knocking on doors and talking to voters. You all know what is on the line with these elections. After two years of school closures, mask mandates, learning loss, and curtails on Wisconsinites’ freedoms, conservatives are motivated to free their local governments from far-left overreach. The efforts over these final days will have lasting impacts on the future of your county and local governments! Check out some of the action from yesterday! "" Our friendly March Metric Madness voter contact competition enters our final round. Kenosha, La Crosse, Waukesha, and the Young Republicans will face off over the final 3 days to see who will conduct the most voter contact and be crowned champion.🏆🏆 The previous round had some close matchups: The Young Republican door deployment to help Sam Kerkman for Kenosha County Executive helped push the Young Republicans past the tough matchup of Calumet county. Speaking of Kenosha, they have consistently been one of the top performing counties and will look to carry this momentum into Election Day! A matchup between two power-house counties in the 3rd district saw La Crosse edge out a 13-point win over Eau Claire.... That is right... a total of 13 doors made the difference....OOOF.... It only goes to show you how important these doors are in the next few days. 😄 * Waukesha is no stranger to being the highest producing voter contact county in the state. Their WISRED local candidate initiative is supporting over 150 candidates in every corner of the county. They are ready to prove why they are called Crucial Waukesha county. | "Help local candidates today!" Paid for by the Republican Party of Wisconsin. body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Peter,
You may know the May 3rd Primary is just 5 weeks away and, March 31 marks the end of the first quarter which is a [fundraising deadline](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) for political campaigns. [Will you make a contribution to Matt Dolan's campaign before midnight on March 31?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) We all agree that Senator Matt Dolan is the most qualified and engaging leader who gets real results for his constituents in Cuyahoga County, as well as the entirety of the state in his role as Senate Finance Chairman. We encourage you to read his [bio](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ2gwzY1QZvB2-WI7YdjZmaTwyVV0mLHATg965-WDjRYpNb4ah3MEL7_-ountOc8bB5b8QqilFqPNbAC8zttGBxZEu7VED-2zqM5Vg4OyRQ0s&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) and [legislative accomplishments](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ5ZCQRGvLymjM3kqXbp33rW1byI-rzxV-x0v4s0XUbfvm3hUCVUaBxR1bZL47TkwFrOLJY5cFs4LlgNuyI6gnpHYpbpBSGNBwJVwsQpeNbmo&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) to learn more. On Monday night, the Republican candidates for U.S. Senate convened outside of Dayton for the third debate of the year, and Matt once again stood out as not only the frontrunner, but the only proven conservative who is willing to stand up for the people of Ohio. While the other candidates focused on rhetoric and politics, Matt Dolan showed he had real solutions for today's challenges. Matt not only has a strong, conservative voting record we can look to, he also has the leadership experience to lead Ohio in the U.S. Senate.
Included in this email are Matt's closing statement from [Monday's debate](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxI1iMJT-qoj82D50jVQskD3aJRMnkH0SPgN_VmTEK1e6Is22EqEhLC2oEc1T6KUX8OLxeG6PFHebha1VOiF4Z4bTrFyvh4VY3YQ1NhuUcJiNXVHoVCkRVcQ==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) - we know what we want from our U.S. Senator and it's someone with a relentless focus on putting Ohio's needs first. We are proud to have invested in Matt's campaign and ask that you to join us in that effort. [Will you consider a contribution of $250, $100, or even $50?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==) You may contribute online, [by clicki](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==)[ng her](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==)[e](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001FrW9XFaZBzF-05XsnGT-JGSoahKfWp6wuPjJde2wKnMcQF1Mz2tXQ1TeY-9416LxTJCRcuyGty07mV2ZdYfU5M5oWCsflhmfO1uR7U9_APrexdNV_kqiIDQLwZXytEse0_gzYF1JrWWGpaWH82Q8OtrqERUkqUcabFy1a_wBpcmh-y_zKmOM2w==&c=1e7a9DY4EHgFY0xgDA1v40FDIBZ8qe-BG9-zWsJpn3wJOKc1TlXXSQ==&ch=jB-kp3rmL2OdKQw-SWk5uNxMY2iAPT3aD8WFuzfXKFEXFbcCggOQdw==). You can also download the form below to contribute via mail, postmarked March 31.
If we want change for our country and for our state, it starts with this race, it starts with Matt Dolan! To speak with Matt or his campaign manager, Kathi Paroska, please call (216) 502-0040. Thank you for your consideration.

| Sincerely, Dolan For Ohio Finance Leadership Team

Thank you for your consideration. | Sincerely, Dolan For Ohio Finance Leadership Team | John Blickle Akron Bill Rudolph Toledo | Alex Fischer Columbus George Vincent Cincinnati | Dr. Rustom Khouri Westlake | == | | == | == | == | | | | | | | Paid for by Dolan for Ohio | PO Box 91212, Cleveland, OH 44101 | | Sent by mailto:matt@dolanforohio.com

name: Strength in Faith Challenge
subject: Praying for our families 🙏
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
Illinois families are struggling right now. Here’s what we’re praying for each day this week >>>| | | Team, For this week’s Strength in Faith challenge, we’re praying for Illinois**families**. As prices for basic necessities like food, fuel, and rent soar across our state, many Illinois families are struggling. These new burdens only add to the pre-existing problems that have driven so many families away from our state: high taxes, rising crime, and rampant political corruption.

This week, we want to lift up every Illinois family struggling right now and pray that they may find relief. Follow along with our daily intentions: MONDAY: We pray for **families struggling with high food prices** , that they may be able to feed their families nutritious, affordable meals.

TUESDAY: We pray for **families struggling to fill their gas tanks** , that they may be able to get enough fuel to get where they need to be, whether it’s work, school, or family commitments.

WEDNESDAY: We pray for **families struggling with high taxes,** that they may make it through this tax season - and that our leaders may lower the outrageous tax burdens they place upon Illinois families. THURSDAY: We pray for **families who are losing trust in our state government** , that their anger at corrupt Illinois politicians may be channeled into bringing real change to our state this year.

FRIDAY: We pray for **families who don’t feel safe in their neighborhoods** , that our state may get serious about our crime crisis and our leaders build a new path forward on public safety, SATURDAY: We pray for **families struggling to find quality education for their children**. May they find the resources and support they need to educate their children in a way that reflects their values and priorities as a family.

SUNDAY: We pray for **families considering leaving Illinois due to rising costs** , that our leaders may restore the people’s faith in our government and act to make every aspect of our state more affordable for families.
---

name: Team Slotkin
subject: Trump’s MI rally, and what it means for Nov.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresshttps://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220403&amount=28 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220403&amount=28]
Team,
Donald Trump visited Michigan yesterday, in his first stop here since his 2020 campaign for President.
The former President visited Washington Township to host a rally in support of some of the Republican candidates running for office across Michigan. It was a night filled with false, and often strange rhetoric, including a bizarre moment where he claimed that no one knows how to pronounce Rep. Peter Meijer’s last name — even though it’s also the name of our most popular grocery store chains. (Anyone who actually knows the Midwest knows the debate is Meijer vs. Meijer’s!).
He’s endorsed a number of candidates running for office in the upcoming midterm elections, some of which you may see on your ballot in November – and some whose actions are truly reprehensible. They’ve promoted conspiracies about the 2020 presidential election and the January 6th attacks, and called for people to “show up armed” to the ballot box.
It’s disgusting. And it’s not what Michigan stands for.
But it’s a good reminder that all eyes will be on Michigan once again this election season. Republicans are eager to flip seats up and down the ballot here as they look toward the next Presidential election in 2024.
Elissa’s seat is the most competitive seat in Michigan and one of the most competitive in the entire country. Control of Congress could be decided in Elissa’s district.
As national groups focus their attention on Michigan, their spending is sure to follow. Will you chip in today to make sure Elissa has the resources to compete in one of the country’s toughest races? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220403&amount=28]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq22022?refcode=email20220403&amount=28]
Team Slotkin

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

clean_body: We have more great news to share, and we wanted you to be the first to know! | = | Peter, We have more great news to share, and we wanted you to be the first to know! Congressman G.K Butterfield just endorsed Valerie for Congress! | = Here's what Congressman Butterfield had to say about Valerie: | | "Valerie Foushee has a distinguished record of working for the people of North Carolina. From the school board to the state legislature,she has stood up to radical Republicans when they've attacked voting rights, women's rights, education, and healthcare. As someone who has served in Congress for 18 years, I am confident that Valerie has what it takes to go to Washington and get things done for the people back home. Washington is not for the faint of heart, it requires real leadership and a true servant's heart. Valerie has both and I am proud to stand behind her in this race." Team, this is a major endorsement. More and more officials agree that Valerie Foushee is the best person to represent NC-04 in Congress. = | = Best, Foushee HQ * | | = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States | | ---|--- Email is a critical way for the Foushee campaign to stay in touch with you. body:
| | |
---
**BREAKING: Committee vote TOMORROW on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson's nomination to the Supreme Court!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3645%2E9716520%2EKPWM6E)
History is about to be made, team.

A **_pivotal_** Senate Judiciary Committee vote is coming up TOMORROW on Judge Ketanji Brown Jackson’s nomination to become the **first Black woman _ever_ on the Supreme Court!**

Judge Jackson is already one of the most popular high-court nominees in DECADES, but in order to track changes in public opinion, **our campaign strategists need to know where you stand BEFORE this history-making vote.**

**So please, tell us now:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3645%2E9716520%2EKPWM6E)
**Do you approve of Judge Jackson’s nomination to the Supreme Court?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/7284?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220403-SupremeCourtUpdate-KBJVotePreview-Pros-sl1&akid=3645%2E9716520%2EKPWM6E)

name: Dick Durbin
subject: My friend Tammy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We must keep the Senate blue this November, and we can’t take any seats for granted.
#
It’s simple, Peter:
We must keep the Senate blue this November, and we can’t take any seats for granted. That’s why I’m working hard to make sure my friend Tammy Duckworth keeps her seat here in Illinois.
**[We can’t keep the Senate blue if we don’t keep Illinois blue. Split a $5 donation between my campaign and Tammy Duckworth’s campaign today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741657/338497914/-1095647923?refcode=dd_em_220403_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ3YmMzOC05NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5n3SSOUYsD3eesgbzs7qddQWvwEQBXPxiXU7Tx9Si0k=)**
I knew Senator Duckworth before she was a Senator. We met when she was recovering from the injuries she sustained in the war in Iraq. She was remarkable then, and has been an incredible and dedicated public servant ever since.
She’s also an invaluable partner and friend in the Senate. We worked closely together to pass the American Rescue Plan and the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law last year. And now we're working together to ensure Judge Jackson’s historic nomination to the Supreme Court becomes an historic confirmation.
But I have to remind people that Illinois had a Republican Senator not too long ago. We cannot take any chances that the next Senate doesn’t include Tammy Duckworth.
**[Senator Duckworth is exactly the kind of person we need in the Senate. Split a donation of $5 today so we can make sure she keeps her seat this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741658/338497915/-1095647923?refcode=dd_em_220403_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ3YmMzOC05NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5n3SSOUYsD3eesgbzs7qddQWvwEQBXPxiXU7Tx9Si0k=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741659/338497916/-1095647923?refcode=dd_em_220403_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTQ3YmMzOC05NWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5n3SSOUYsD3eesgbzs7qddQWvwEQBXPxiXU7Tx9Si0k=)****

Nancy Pelosi’s PAC just announced their ad buys for the 2022 election, and IOWA is at the top of the list! Congresswoman Miller-Meeks only won by six votes because of her antics in 2020, and I need your help to stand strong this cycle! We need to take the House and take down Nancy Pelosi, but I can’t do it without my fellow patriots! Do we want the Socialist Left to have control of the House for two more years?? I am so tired of paying more and more for gas and groceries each day. I know I can’t afford two more years of this, and I’m guessing you can’t either. Congresswoman Miller-Meeks is ready to FIGHT BACK, but we need your help if we want to show not just Iowans but the American people that our conservative policies WORK and our conservative values matter. name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins Weekly Legislative & Campaign Trail Update April 3, 2022
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac8af781ec3e/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail-8870049?e=698f056321)
---
I’m Brice Wiggins, and I’m running for Congress in Mississippi’s 4th Congressional District in the Republican primary set for June 7th. I’ve been a State Senator from Pascagoula for 10 years and have a track record of working hard and getting things done. You can learn more about me, my record and my campaign [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=1457d9a179&e=698f056321). Below are some highlights from this week in my role as State Senator along with updates from our Congressional Campaign. I hope you continue to keep up with us as I continue fulfilling my duties as State Senator. This is a top priority for me during this campaign, because I took an oath to honorably serve my constituents and the Constitution.
|
---
|
---
_Patience and perseverance have a magical effect before which difficulties disappear and obstacles vanish.__-John Quincy Adams_
|
---
## Signing of the Historic Teacher Pay Raise
| | | | | | A monumental day happened on Thursday. I joined Governor Tate Reeves and other Education leaders for the signing of the largest single teacher pay raise in the state's history. Being a member of the Senate Education Committee since entering the Senate, a teacher pay raise of this magnitude is something we have worked on for a long time. Getting things done is what we are about.Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=31e5201fbe&e=698f056321) to watch the Facebook Live of the signing.|
---
|
---
## Mississippi Women Now on Equal Pay Footing – Wiggins Leads Senate Effort
| | | | | |
---
| Wednesday was a historical day for the women of Mississippi! The Mississippi Equal Pay for Equal Work Act, on which I was the lead Senate author and Conferee, passed both the House and Senate and will head to the Governor’s desk for signature. Read our official statement by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=b7b08b57cb&e=698f056321) and see the [**LINKED VIDEO**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=93c597ab74&e=698f056321) of me on the Senate floor presenting the bill beginning at the 4:15:50 minute mark.|
---
## Appeared on Girard Gibert’s Show on Supertalk: “Wrapping Up the Legislative Session”
| | | | | | I always enjoy great discussion with Girard Gibert on his Middays show on Supertalk. This week was no exception. I had a chance to reflect on what has been an amazing Legislative session this year. I also discussed our Congressional campaign and what you can expect. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=44bfcbeab5&e=698f056321) to watch the full interview. |
---
|
---
## Buddy’s Law Is Getting A Second Chance
| | | | | |
---
| Buddy’s Law, originally known as [**Senate Bill 2261**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=c582b62985&e=698f056321), is getting another chance in the Mississippi legislature! The original bill, which I co-authored, enforces punishment for animal abusers and mandates psychological assessments and treatments for youths who torture animals. It passed both the House and Senate and will now go to the Governor’s desk for signature.Being a dog lover myself, I know that dogs are truly man's best friend.Read the WLOX article for more information by clicking [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=166350a1ad&e=698f056321).|
---
## Video Interview With Frank Corder of Y’all Politics
| | | | | | On Monday, I sat down with Frank Corder from Y’all Politics to recap conference weekend in the Mississippi Legislature. The voters sent me to Jackson to do a job in person and voting proxy is something I don’t do. We discussed state income tax, redistricting maps, and much more. Click [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=64d4b8982c&e=698f056321) to watch my interview and read the article.|
---
|
---
| | | | | | |
---
### The Primary is June 7! Click Below for the Secretary of State Voter Information Guide for Details
Did you know that if you are not going to be in town on June 7, you can vote Absentee April 23 through June 4. You can apply to vote absentee as soon as April 8 (yes 5 days from now).Did you know that 17 year olds can vote on June 7 if they turn 18 before the General Election in November?CLICK [**HERE**](https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=20775fa48d&e=698f056321) for the Secretary of State’s Voter Information Guide that contains this and other helpful information.
|
---
## The Week Ahead
* Monday: signing and passing of Appropriations bills to finish the state budget. Negotiations Continue.
* Tuesday or Wednesday: Adjournment! Signing App Bills
* Thursday: Walking door-to-door begins. Check out our social media to see if we are in your area.
* Friday or Saturday: Re-cap of the 2022 legislative session; tax cut, teacher pay raise, medical marijuana, CRT, anti-Covid 19 vaccine mandate, equal pay for women.

|
---
Please stay tuned for future emails with updates from the legislative session, District 52, community events, and our Congressional campaign. Our campaign is in full swing and as you know, getting our message out takes funding. If you would like to provide financial support, please click the button below.

Sincerely,

body:
This isn't good.
| | |
---
This isn't good, Peter: Gov. Lujan Grisham just sent a message about her critical deadline tomorrow, and she's _still_ short of her goal.
From December to March, our team wasn't able to fundraise because of the legislative session – and ANOTHER fundraising blackout will start on April 5. This is horrible news in an election year.
**I won't mince words here: If we miss this goal, we'll have to make budget cuts – and that's just not an option while the GOP spends big on attack ads against the Governor.**
**[Please, Peter, will you rush $5 right now to help Gov. Lujan Grisham reach her goal by tomorrow at midnight and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741991/338500137/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJU9WiTfROxo0Qrc4qIp5Sm37eax2v_yOd47pyhOF9w=)**

[Rush a $5 donation now to keep New Mexico blue. >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741993/338500139/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJU9WiTfROxo0Qrc4qIp5Sm37eax2v_yOd47pyhOF9w=)**
With you by my side, I've made massive strides toward our progressive vision: I took bold action on climate change, signed a bill to provide free higher education, legalized cannabis, and so much more.
The problem is, all of this progress could be erased in an instant if the GOP wins in November – and I've become a target for national Republicans who want to block our progressive agenda.
I'm already behind on my fundraising goals because I was not allowed to fundraise during the legislative session from December through March – and ANOTHER fundraising blackout starts Tuesday.
**I'm working to protect our state from far-right radicalism, but I can't do it alone. With a huge fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight, I need your help now more than ever to reach my $150,000 goal.**
**[If everyone reading this email donates whatever they can, we can close this fundraising gap tonight. Peter, will you please donate $5 – or whatever you can spare – to help me meet my goal and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43741994/338500140/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1208-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YmZmNDMxYi05YWIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VJU9WiTfROxo0Qrc4qIp5Sm37eax2v_yOd47pyhOF9w=)**
I'm so grateful for your grassroots support. None of my work is possible without progressive advocates like you.

Michelle Lujan Grisham

name: Team Tobias
subject: The most beatable Democrat (Not Tobias)
body:
This week Willamette Week finally said what’s been on all of our minds for the last few months.
---
| | Dear Peter, This week _Willamette Week_ finally said what’s been on all of our minds for the last few months: **Former Speaker Tina Kotek is the most beatable Democratic candidate for Governor in decades.** Republicans are lining up by the dozen to get the chance to run for Governor this year because they know that if Tina Kotek is the Democratic nominee, they’ll have a better chance to win. **[Give the _Willamette Week_ article a read here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742209/338500568/-972448162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTcxNzg0NC05YmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVyCNUUL7jjBtI3Kkg4SnApzvrvL4IB7SZb_Ha9eTEU=&emci=7a4269f2-9ab3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=71717844-9bb3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/43742211/338500570/-972448162?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTcxNzg0NC05YmIzLWVjMTEtOTk3ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tVyCNUUL7jjBtI3Kkg4SnApzvrvL4IB7SZb_Ha9eTEU=&emci=7a4269f2-9ab3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&emdi=71717844-9bb3-ec11-997e-281878b83d8a&ceid=30662126) People who have served in the Governor’s office and the legislature are endorsing Tobias because they know that he’s the candidate with the integrity, the experience, and the electability to lead Oregon. Former Rep. Margaret Doherty is supporting Tobias because, in her words “I worked with both of them... I want someone in that office who has integrity.” As former Democratic State Rep. Jules Bailey put it: “Sh**’s not working.” And after a decade as Speaker of the House, what was Kotek’s response: “I agree,” Kotek says. “I don’t think things are working the way they should be working.” **It’s time for change.** It’s time for new leadership and a fresh approach. It’s time for Tobias. Thanks,
Team Tobias
---

---

Republicans are lining up by the dozen to get the chance to run for Governor this year because they know that if Tina Kotek is the Democratic nominee, they’ll have a better chance to win. People who have served in the Governor’s office and the legislature are endorsing Tobias because they know that he’s the candidate with the integrity, the experience, and the electability to lead Oregon. Former Rep. Margaret Doherty is supporting Tobias because, in her words “I worked with both of them... I want someone in that office who has integrity.” As former Democratic State Rep. Jules Bailey put it: “Sh’s not working.” And after a decade as Speaker of the House, what was Kotek’s response: “I agree,” Kotek says. “I don’t think things are working the way they should be working.” It’s time for change. It’s time for new leadership and a fresh approach. It’s time for Tobias. Thanks, Team Tobias | = | | | | | | | | | Friends of Tobias Read PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 United States

---

During October 1993, in Operation Gothic Serpent, my Black Hawk helicopter was hit by an RPG and crashed in Mogadishu, Somalia. You might know my story from the movie _Black Hawk Down._

**When I was captured and held as a Prisoner of War, I heard the voice and promise of Dan Jollotta broadcast from the sky.** He was up there calling out to me. Searching desperately for me, he knew that he was flying above a hornet's nest of RPGs and could get himself shot down at any second, but he just didn’t give a damn.

I will never forget his words because they serve as a constant reminder that no man gets left behind. No matter what, we will never abandon our men and women. **_That’s something Joe Biden needs to learn right now._**

**I sat down with Dan, almost 30 years later, to record a special interview with him.**
[**LISTEN NOW**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=137fad49709f439887c125fe76e882e9&_e=hvIh-qvWvehX9pEJmsj7w1lxXTfUMEs_JT6KR1U62LrGE-IWO4gP9Fmfk2UKsJ_PhKPUWe3WVdMc0M5_vPeFURHuViqnEd-xibAzuKGyPrUBt8VLl_56l-nlBde7Kea5sleaYZq-C9xMpkDbOHbfJctwZD1anZFzzsDirBjtXHncOojo5KyoVHkNTUwboNZ_OSPFuA0zyEPlXQ_Y2A1degJxuhwzjSXTixyKHwbz0OM5-KFpqtPaLER_W7LVQKSA8X7WMY_fFgKknnw5h8lLojp6DNTK7IjD9se7cz35EES0pH5HSfogRjXv3g4oWf6hRSOdBfRRZ_F6ONXMSW0D1Qk9Ko5Ag2hcA7ZQJSuOSHY9Qn4kr-PQ59tmJA-vbRv15BTdx0FW-i8VXA4xfbCVclS1Pymi_pn0_6_gT9nG4mnhoSXel8cn6zNL6Y1GW1BigO9GOa6tQKE7yNruw5Jw_ZUQnmBU8CyFJ5m4qMIBz0h1PST2tSXXlja0B6Oq3T9g_B_yg4anPVTV6bmiG0K-IXLSEGJ6NJF-WoerJZ3WnjNgnBtaNquxUKYoyqL4MfVA)
---
[**HEAR THE REAL STORY**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=137fad49709f439887c125fe76e882e9&_e=hvIh-qvWvehX9pEJmsj7w1lxXTfUMEs_JT6KR1U62LrGE-IWO4gP9Fmfk2UKsJ_PhKPUWe3WVdMc0M5_vPeFURHuViqnEd-xibAzuKGyPrUBt8VLl_56l-nlBde7Kea5sleaYZq-C9xMpkDbOHbfJctwZD1anZFzzsDirBjtXHncOojo5KyoVHkNTUwboNZ_OSPFuA0zyEPlXQ_Y2A1degJxuhwzjSXTixyKHwbz0OM5-KFpqtPaLER_W7LVQKSA8X7WMY_fFgKknnw5h8lLojp6DNTK7IjD9se7cz35EES0pH5HSfogRjXv3g4oWf6hRSOdBfRRZ_F6ONXMSW0D1Qk9Ko5Ag2hcA7ZQJSuOSHbuiBqtkP99QfmztVqEUEtCy7t2QSxPR_oZ_09X-489kGvwEdciF_x_jcq6VJ8hWr-RtOFtiuCOpfr9w0k8kwJ4L1-sGZsn3rDbtnUyM4DjvexNc_01r-ahrugWx8Pmp-DIhGiFA7EXwF-XQE4FasrDrJTivks9D4erjvmbzQnjORViklioiEZuvJX4F6b68lN3v2Y-W0W3EgA87Nzeyfc5)
---

After watching the Biden administration desert our core principles, I decided to jump in the race for the U.S. Senate. I can’t sit by on the sidelines while Joe Biden and Career Politicians abandon our allies (along with American citizens), cower to the influence of China and Russia, and let the Radical Left open our borders and fundamentally redefine what America stands for.
[**JOIN MY CAMPAIGN**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=137fad49709f439887c125fe76e882e9&_e=hvIh-qvWvehX9pEJmsj7w1lxXTfUMEs_JT6KR1U62LrGE-IWO4gP9Fmfk2UKsJ_PhKPUWe3WVdMc0M5_vPeFURHuViqnEd-xibAzuKGyPrUBt8VLl_56l-nlBde7Kea5sleaYZq-C9xMpkDbOHbfJctwZD1anZFzzsDirBjtXHncOojo5KyoVHkNTUwboNZ_OSPFuA0zyEPlXQ_Y2A1degJxuhwzjSXTixyKHwbz0OM5-KFpqtPaLER_W7LVQKSA8X7WMY_fFgKknnw5h8lLojp6DNTK7IjD9se7cz35EES0pH5HSfogRjXv3g4oWf6hRSOdBfRRZ_F6ONXMSW0D1Qk9Ko5Ag2hcA7ZQJSuOSHbcFfpZ47iID5QF3JNq4QOLy6dHRZQ3KAZfRg0pHi3Kr6wTtBwRfgqoW8f2JxOvoTwMimjt9ohUwJtE4SNpm4iR2yI1fE-pYo8HKcr6qDqFMLmsDIUmk0L4mYaVertacSfZaPel5g15EYOJUWlPakPtO1fpVj4i9jsbX7jmdvSwmWZzRmfEe5l0S-2cn8yd39rhFDMlyHaRSqq-hTGXyfLu)
---
[**STAND UP FOR AMERICA**](http://links.durantforsenate.com/u/click?_t=02743ebc773d4d56aaad0942d1097fe3&_m=137fad49709f439887c125fe76e882e9&_e=hvIh-qvWvehX9pEJmsj7w1lxXTfUMEs_JT6KR1U62LrGE-IWO4gP9Fmfk2UKsJ_PhKPUWe3WVdMc0M5_vPeFURHuViqnEd-xibAzuKGyPrUBt8VLl_56l-nlBde7Kea5sleaYZq-C9xMpkDbOHbfJctwZD1anZFzzsDirBjtXHncOojo5KyoVHkNTUwboNZ_OSPFuA0zyEPlXQ_Y2A1degJxuhwzjSXTixyKHwbz0OM5-KFpqtPaLER_W7LVQKSA8X7WMY_fFgKknnw5h8lLojp6DNTK7IjD9se7cz35EES0pH5HSfogRjXv3g4oWf6hRSOdBfRRZ_F6ONXMSW0D1Qk9Ko5Ag2hcA7ZQJSuOSHZuu4Xz95vVP4A0-UNs3a5c0KM8ikL2agZ1afAFrkv5MLlEpAjosv3f8H9As8vUO6MhY9YTBO2aryHMkvrLJT-8ovFAZwuFAQv-J_4r2EhXRSYWYvYrcw2Kid724Uhi-geeEYvlyWf3KE4Z1v0WPs2vjk2dpGf3iUcekKDgs152HkKMhUxTMemNnEQL8de6r1fANVyETH1MPdq3ECvz-FOi)
---

I hope you take the chance to listen to my interview with Dan Jollota today. He is a true hero and a true patriot. We could all learn something from him.

Sincerely,

body:
Dear Friend,

We hope you're enjoying a rejuvenating Sunday, getting the rest you need so that you're ready to fight for PA's future.

And we have a tough fight ahead. That's why we're asking you to take action TODAY: Sign up NOW for the 13th annual Keystone Progress Summit -- Pennsylvania's Progressive Summit. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040322]

Our democracy, our health, our rights, our jobs, our planet — all are under aggressive attack by conservative lawmakers in PA and in D.C. The only way to protect our state is by learning more about the issues and candidates, organizing and mobilizing voters, and working together to push back.

Sign up NOW so that we can do just that on April 8-9 at the summit. Do not wait. Register today.
- It's only $20.22.
- It's virtual, so you can attend from anywhere.
- It's extremely important. We can't organize a response to these challenges without your participation.

The only way forward is to work together, so please register today. [https://hopin.com/events/keystone-progress-summit-2022?utm_source=email&utm_campaign=040322]
\
Pat Clark
Keystone Progress
